---
title: ""
engine: knitr
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    embed-resources: false
    resources:
      - shinylive-sw.js
      - data/index.json
      - data/codexbar_cost_per_day.json
      - data/codexbar_cost_per_project.json
      - data/codexbar_cost_per_session.json
      - data/legacy_ccusage_daily.json
      - data/ccusage_sessions.json
      - data/legacy_ccusage_blocks.json
      - data/gemini_daily.json
      - data/gemini_sessions.json
      - data/codex_daily.json
      - data/codex_sessions.json
      - data/cmonitor_summary.json
      - data/git_commits.json
      - data/git_commits_by_project.json
      - data/git_bus_factor.json
      - data/git_velocity.json
      - data/git_timing.json
      - data/git_crisis.json
      - data/git_churn.json
      - data/git_bugs.json
      - data/git_todo.json
      - data/git_tags.json
      - data/git_file_growth.json
      - data/github_issue_events.json
      - data/unified_sessions.json
      - data/unified_costs.json
      - data/cost_by_project_estimated.json
      - data/tokens_by_project.json
      - data/projects_master.json
      - data/predictions.json
      - data/calibration_buckets.json
      - data/weekly_commits_by_project.json
      - data/cost_per_commit.json
      - data/file_churn.json
      - data/change_coupling.json
      - data/roborev_summary.json
      - data/roborev_by_repo.json
      - data/roborev_resolution.json
      - data/roborev_agent_perf.json
      - data/roborev_backlog_age.json
      - data/roborev_repo_signal.json
      - data/roborev/latest.json
      - data/roborev_noise_rate.json
      - data/roborev_suppression.json
      - data/roborev_cadence_efficacy.json
      - data/roborev_threshold_history.json
      - data/roborev_cost_per_finding.json
      - data/roborev_cost_per_agent.json
      - data/roborev_vs_session_cost.json
      - data/roborev_commit_findings.json
      - data/roborev_session_agent_noise.json
      - data/roborev_session_findings.json
      - data/roborev_location_findings.json
      - data/config_staleness.json
      - data/v1/sessions.parquet
      - data/v1/costs.parquet
      - data/v1/git_commits.parquet
filters:
  - shinylive
---

```{shinylive-r}
#| standalone: true
#| viewerHeight: 1200

# WebR bundles rlang 1.1.6. dplyr 1.2.1/echarts4r need rlang >= 1.1.7.
# The preload scanner skips re-downloading bundled rlang, so the conflict
# is unavoidable. Solution: use base R + JS ECharts (no dplyr/echarts4r).
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(DT)
library(jsonlite)
library(lubridate, warn.conflicts = FALSE)

# --- Helpers ------------------------------------------------------------------
coalesce2 <- function(x, y) { x[is.na(x)] <- y[is.na(x)]; x }

# to_chart_json — toJSON wrapper that handles DT::JS()/htmlwidgets::JS()
# objects (the JS_EVAL class). jsonlite asJSON dispatch has no entry for
# that class, so a spec containing a JS() leaf aborted at toJSON time and
# the panel rendered the serializer error string instead of a chart.
# Walk the spec, swap each JS_EVAL leaf for a unique placeholder, serialize,
# then substitute each placeholder for its original JS code (which becomes
# a function literal in the resulting JSON-with-functions string that
# echarts.setOption() can eval). Fixes #290 follow-up: many dashboard panels
# that used DT::JS() for axis label / tooltip formatters were silently
# failing because the serializer aborted.
# Note: the literal strings the pre-deploy HTML guard scans for are
# deliberately avoided in this comment — the source is embedded in the
# rendered HTML and tripping the guard fails the next deploy (see the
# original deploy failure tracking on llmtelemetry#285).
to_chart_json <- function(option) {
  store <- list()
  walk <- function(x) {
    if (inherits(x, "JS_EVAL")) {
      key <- paste0("__JS_EVAL_", length(store), "__")
      store[[key]] <<- paste(as.character(x), collapse = "\n")
      return(key)
    }
    if (is.list(x)) return(lapply(x, walk))
    x
  }
  option <- walk(option)
  j <- toJSON(option, auto_unbox = TRUE, null = "null")
  for (key in names(store)) {
    j <- gsub(paste0('"', key, '"'), store[[key]], j, fixed = TRUE)
  }
  j
}

ec <- function(option, h = "300px", aria_label = "Interactive chart") {
  id <- paste0("ec", sample.int(1e7, 1))
  j <- to_chart_json(option)
  tagList(
    tags$div(id = id, class = "echart-div", role = "button", `aria-label` = aria_label,
             tabindex = "0",
             style = paste0("width:100%;height:", h, ";cursor:zoom-in")),
    tags$script(HTML(paste0(
      "(function(){var c=echarts.init(document.getElementById('", id,
      "'),'dark');c.setOption(", j, ");new ResizeObserver(function(){c.resize()})",
      ".observe(document.getElementById('", id, "'));",
      "function fs(){var url=c.getDataURL({type:'png',pixelRatio:2,backgroundColor:'#000'});",
      "var ov=document.createElement('div');ov.className='fullscreen-overlay';",
      "var img=document.createElement('img');img.src=url;ov.appendChild(img);",
      "ov.onclick=function(){ov.remove()};document.body.appendChild(ov)}",
      "document.getElementById('", id, "').addEventListener('click',fs);",
      "document.getElementById('", id, "').addEventListener('keydown',function(e){",
      "if(e.key==='Enter'||e.key===' '){e.preventDefault();fs()}})})();"
    )))
  )
}

ec_empty <- function(msg = "No data available", h = "300px") {
  ec(list(title = list(text = msg, textStyle = list(color = "#ccc", fontSize = 14)),
          grid = list(containLabel = TRUE)), h, aria_label = msg)
}

ec_line <- function(dates, series, h = "300px", y_name = NULL, aria_label = "Line chart",
                    default_window_days = 90) {
  y_axis <- list(type = "value", scale = TRUE)
  if (!is.null(y_name)) y_axis$name <- y_name
  # Compute dynamic dataZoom start to default to last ~3 months
  dz_start <- 0
  if (length(dates) > 1) {
    d_dates <- tryCatch(as.Date(as.character(dates)), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(d_dates) && !all(is.na(d_dates))) {
      total_days <- as.numeric(max(d_dates, na.rm = TRUE) - min(d_dates, na.rm = TRUE))
      if (!is.na(total_days) && total_days > default_window_days) {
        dz_start <- round(100 * (1 - default_window_days / total_days))
      }
    }
  }
  ec(list(
    tooltip = list(trigger = "axis"),
    legend = list(bottom = 30, textStyle = list(color = "#ccc")),
    toolbox = list(feature = list(
      dataZoom = list(yAxisIndex = "none"),
      restore = list(),
      saveAsImage = list()
    )),
    dataZoom = list(
      list(type = "inside", start = dz_start, end = 100, filterMode = "filter"),
      list(type = "slider", start = dz_start, end = 100, bottom = 5, filterMode = "filter")
    ),
    grid = list(containLabel = TRUE, bottom = 80),
    xAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(as.character(dates))),
    yAxis = y_axis,
    series = series
  ), h, aria_label = aria_label)
}

ec_bar <- function(cats, series, h = "300px", y_name = NULL, aria_label = "Bar chart",
                   default_window_days = 90) {
  y_axis <- list(type = "value")
  if (!is.null(y_name)) y_axis$name <- y_name
  # Compute dynamic dataZoom start to default to last ~3 months
  dz_start <- 0
  if (length(cats) > 1) {
    d_dates <- tryCatch(as.Date(as.character(cats)), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(d_dates) && !all(is.na(d_dates))) {
      total_days <- as.numeric(max(d_dates, na.rm = TRUE) - min(d_dates, na.rm = TRUE))
      if (!is.na(total_days) && total_days > default_window_days) {
        dz_start <- round(100 * (1 - default_window_days / total_days))
      }
    }
  }
  ec(list(
    tooltip = list(trigger = "axis"),
    legend = list(bottom = 30, textStyle = list(color = "#ccc")),
    toolbox = list(feature = list(
      dataZoom = list(yAxisIndex = "none"),
      restore = list(),
      saveAsImage = list()
    )),
    dataZoom = list(
      list(type = "inside", start = dz_start, end = 100),
      list(type = "slider", start = dz_start, end = 100, bottom = 5)
    ),
    grid = list(containLabel = TRUE, bottom = 80),
    xAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(as.character(cats)),
                 axisLabel = list(rotate = 30)),
    yAxis = y_axis,
    series = series
  ), h, aria_label = aria_label)
}

ec_scatter <- function(data_pts, color = "#377eb8", h = "300px",
                       x_type = "value", size_col = 3, scale = 3,
                       aria_label = "Scatter chart") {
  id <- paste0("ec", sample.int(1e7, 1))
  opt <- list(
    tooltip = list(trigger = "item"),
    grid = list(containLabel = TRUE),
    xAxis = list(type = x_type),
    yAxis = list(type = "value"),
    series = list(list(type = "scatter", data = data_pts,
                       itemStyle = list(color = color)))
  )
  j <- to_chart_json(opt)
  tagList(
    tags$div(id = id, class = "echart-div", role = "button", `aria-label` = aria_label,
             tabindex = "0", style = paste0("width:100%;height:", h, ";cursor:zoom-in")),
    tags$script(HTML(paste0(
      "(function(){var c=echarts.init(document.getElementById('", id, "'),'dark');",
      "var o=", j, ";",
      "o.series[0].symbolSize=function(d){return Math.max(5,Math.sqrt(Math.abs(d[",
      size_col - 1, "]))*", scale, ")};",
      "c.setOption(o);new ResizeObserver(function(){c.resize()})",
      ".observe(document.getElementById('", id, "'));",
      "function fs(){var url=c.getDataURL({type:'png',pixelRatio:2,backgroundColor:'#000'});",
      "var ov=document.createElement('div');ov.className='fullscreen-overlay';",
      "var img=document.createElement('img');img.src=url;ov.appendChild(img);",
      "ov.onclick=function(){ov.remove()};document.body.appendChild(ov)}",
      "document.getElementById('", id, "').addEventListener('click',fs);",
      "document.getElementById('", id, "').addEventListener('keydown',function(e){",
      "if(e.key==='Enter'||e.key===' '){e.preventDefault();fs()}})})();"
    )))
  )
}

ec_heatmap <- function(data, x, y, value, h = "350px",
                       default_window_weeks = 13,
                       aria_label = "Heatmap chart") {
  # Build x/y axis labels
  xs <- sort(unique(data[[x]]))
  ys <- sort(unique(data[[y]]))
  # Dynamic x-axis window: default to last ~13 weeks
  dz_start <- 0
  if (length(xs) > default_window_weeks) {
    dz_start <- round(100 * (1 - default_window_weeks / length(xs)))
  }
  heat_data <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(data)), function(i)
    list(match(data[[x]][i], xs) - 1L, match(data[[y]][i], ys) - 1L,
         as.numeric(data[[value]][i])))
  max_val <- max(as.numeric(data[[value]]), na.rm = TRUE)
  id <- paste0("ec", sample.int(1e7, 1))
  opt <- list(
    tooltip = list(trigger = "item",
      formatter = paste0("function(p){return p.value[2]+' commits at week '+",
                         "p.value[0]+'}')")),
    grid = list(left = 100, bottom = 80, containLabel = TRUE),
    xAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(xs), axisLabel = list(rotate = 30)),
    yAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(ys)),
    dataZoom = list(
      list(type = "inside", xAxisIndex = 0, start = dz_start, end = 100),
      list(type = "slider", xAxisIndex = 0, start = dz_start, end = 100, bottom = 5)
    ),
    visualMap = list(min = 0, max = max(max_val, 1), calculable = TRUE,
      orient = "horizontal", left = "center", top = "top",
      inRange = list(color = I(c("#1a2a1a", "#238636", "#40c463", "#7ee787"))),
      textStyle = list(color = "#ccc")),
    series = list(list(
      type = "heatmap", data = heat_data,
      emphasis = list(itemStyle = list(shadowBlur = 10, shadowColor = "rgba(0,0,0,0.5)"))
    ))
  )
  j <- to_chart_json(opt)
  tagList(
    tags$div(id = id, class = "echart-div", role = "img",
             `aria-label` = aria_label, tabindex = "0",
             style = paste0("width:100%;height:", h, ";cursor:zoom-in")),
    tags$script(HTML(paste0(
      "(function(){var c=echarts.init(document.getElementById('", id, "'),'dark');",
      "c.setOption(", j, ");new ResizeObserver(function(){c.resize()})",
      ".observe(document.getElementById('", id, "'));",
      "function fs(){var url=c.getDataURL({type:'png',pixelRatio:2,backgroundColor:'#000'});",
      "var ov=document.createElement('div');ov.className='fullscreen-overlay';",
      "var img=document.createElement('img');img.src=url;ov.appendChild(img);",
      "ov.onclick=function(){ov.remove()};document.body.appendChild(ov)}",
      "document.getElementById('", id, "').addEventListener('click',fs);",
      "document.getElementById('", id, "').addEventListener('keydown',function(e){",
      "if(e.key==='Enter'||e.key===' '){e.preventDefault();fs()}})})();"
    )))
  )
}

ec_force_graph <- function(nodes, edges, h = "400px",
                           aria_label = "Force-directed graph") {
  id <- paste0("ec", sample.int(1e7, 1))
  opt <- list(
    tooltip = list(trigger = "item",
      formatter = "function(p){if(p.dataType==='edge')return p.data.source+' ↔ '+p.data.target+': '+p.data.n_cochanges+' co-changes'; return p.data.name}"),
    legend = list(top = "bottom", textStyle = list(color = "#ccc")),
    series = list(list(
      type = "graph",
      layout = "force",
      force = list(repulsion = 120, gravity = 0.05, edgeLength = list(50, 150)),
      roam = TRUE,
      draggable = TRUE,
      data = nodes,
      links = edges,
      label = list(show = TRUE, position = "right", color = "#ccc", fontSize = 10),
      lineStyle = list(color = "source", curveness = 0.1),
      categories = list(
        list(name = "llm", itemStyle = list(color = "#377eb8")),
        list(name = "llmtelemetry", itemStyle = list(color = "#e41a1c")),
        list(name = "other", itemStyle = list(color = "#4daf4a"))
      ),
      emphasis = list(focus = "adjacency",
        lineStyle = list(width = 4))
    ))
  )
  j <- to_chart_json(opt)
  tagList(
    tags$div(id = id, class = "echart-div", role = "img",
             `aria-label` = aria_label, tabindex = "0",
             style = paste0("width:100%;height:", h, ";cursor:zoom-in")),
    tags$script(HTML(paste0(
      "(function(){var c=echarts.init(document.getElementById('", id, "'),'dark');",
      "c.setOption(", j, ");new ResizeObserver(function(){c.resize()})",
      ".observe(document.getElementById('", id, "'))})();"
    )))
  )
}

# Stable source palette — defined once, used in every "by source" chart.
# Per narrative-colour-persistence rule: NEVER define inline palettes.
SOURCE_PALETTE <- c(
  claude = "#d97757",   # anthropic orange
  gemini = "#4285f4",   # google blue
  codex  = "#10a37f"    # openai green
)
pal <- list(
  claude = SOURCE_PALETTE[["claude"]],
  gemini = SOURCE_PALETTE[["gemini"]],
  codex  = SOURCE_PALETTE[["codex"]],
  accent = "#4daf4a",
  purple = "#984ea3", orange = "#ff7f00", hist = "#377eb8"
)

# --- Data loading -------------------------------------------------------------
# WebR's download.file runs in a Web Worker; relative URLs (e.g. "data/X.json")
# resolve against the worker's deep script path, NOT the page URL — so they
# 404 in production. Plain "/data/" is also wrong: it resolves to the host
# root, dropping the "/llmtelemetry/" project sub-path on the GH Pages site.
# The correct value is the origin-absolute project path "/llmtelemetry/data/"
# which resolves to https://johngavin.github.io/llmtelemetry/data/X.json.
# NOTE: if this dashboard is ever served from a different base path, this
# prefix must be updated (or computed from window.location.pathname).
base_url <- "/llmtelemetry/data/"

load_json <- function(filename) {
  tryCatch({
    tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".json")
    download.file(paste0(base_url, filename), tmp, mode = "w", quiet = TRUE)
    fromJSON(txt = tmp, simplifyDataFrame = TRUE)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("Failed to load ", filename, ": ", e$message)
    NULL
  })
}

# (#281 Phase 2): CodexBar is now primary; ccusage renamed to legacy_*
cb_per_day  <- load_json("codexbar_cost_per_day.json")
cc_daily    <- load_json("legacy_ccusage_daily.json")
cc_sessions <- load_json("ccusage_sessions.json")
cc_blocks   <- load_json("legacy_ccusage_blocks.json")
gem_daily   <- load_json("gemini_daily.json")
gem_sess    <- load_json("gemini_sessions.json")
codex_d_raw <- load_json("codex_daily.json")
codex_s_raw <- load_json("codex_sessions.json")
cmon        <- load_json("cmonitor_summary.json")
git_commits <- load_json("git_commits.json")
git_commits_proj <- load_json("git_commits_by_project.json")
u_sessions  <- load_json("unified_sessions.json")
u_costs     <- load_json("unified_costs.json")
cost_proj   <- load_json("cost_by_project_estimated.json")
tok_proj    <- load_json("tokens_by_project.json")
preds_raw   <- load_json("predictions.json")
cal_buckets <- load_json("calibration_buckets.json")
git_bus     <- load_json("git_bus_factor.json")
git_vel     <- load_json("git_velocity.json")
git_timing  <- load_json("git_timing.json")
git_crisis  <- load_json("git_crisis.json")
git_churn   <- load_json("git_churn.json")
git_bugs    <- load_json("git_bugs.json")
git_todo    <- load_json("git_todo.json")
git_tags    <- load_json("git_tags.json")
git_file_growth <- load_json("git_file_growth.json")
gh_events   <- load_json("github_issue_events.json")
# Phase 2 data: new analytical JSON exports
weekly_commits <- load_json("weekly_commits_by_project.json")
# DEPRECATED(#83 Phase 5): cost_per_commit migrated to DuckDB-WASM JOIN query.
# cost_per_commit.json is no longer read at startup; kept for reference until JSON export is removed.
cost_per_commit_data <- list()  # replaced by queryAndRenderCostPerCommit() JS function
file_churn_data <- load_json("file_churn.json")
change_coupling_data <- load_json("change_coupling.json")
# Phase B: canonical project master list (excludes agent-worktree/orphan rows)
projects_master_raw <- load_json("projects_master.json")
# Config-usage ETL data (skill_usage_etl.R → unified.duckdb → config_staleness view)
config_staleness_raw <- load_json("config_staleness.json")

# Normalize data: fromJSON("[]") returns list(), nested objects need extraction
as_df <- function(x) if (is.data.frame(x)) x else NULL
git_file_growth <- as_df(git_file_growth)
gh_events <- as_df(gh_events)
weekly_commits <- as_df(weekly_commits)
# cost_per_commit_data: no longer a data frame (deprecated, migrated to DuckDB-WASM)
file_churn_data <- as_df(file_churn_data)
change_coupling_data <- as_df(change_coupling_data)
has_rows <- function(x) is.data.frame(x) && nrow(x) > 0
# Normalise the master list; fall back gracefully
projects_master_raw <- as_df(projects_master_raw)
projects_master_canonical <- if (has_rows(projects_master_raw) && "canonical_project" %in% names(projects_master_raw))
  sort(projects_master_raw$canonical_project) else character(0)
config_staleness_df <- as_df(config_staleness_raw)

# Shorten project path: keep last 2 meaningful segments
# Also strip worktree suffixes to aggregate to project level
shorten_proj <- function(x) {
  x <- sub("^-Users-johngavin-docs[-_]gh-", "", x)
  x <- sub("^-private-tmp-", "", x)  # git worktrees under /private/tmp/
  x <- sub("^-tmp-", "", x)
  x <- sub("^llm-", "", x)
  x <- sub("^proj-", "", x)
  x <- sub("-worktree-[0-9]+$", "", x)
  gsub("-", "/", x)
}

# Aggregate worktrees into parent project.
# After shorten_proj, "llmtelemetry/sonnet" -> "llmtelemetry" when "llmtelemetry" exists.
canonical_proj <- function(x, base_projects) {
  base <- sub("/.*$", "", x)
  ifelse(base %in% base_projects & base != x, base, x)
}

# Human-readable token count: 118555583 -> "118.6M", 3000000000 -> "3B"
fmt_tokens <- function(x) {
  ifelse(is.na(x) | x == 0, "0",
    ifelse(abs(x) >= 1e9, paste0(round(x / 1e9, 1), "B"),
    ifelse(abs(x) >= 1e6, paste0(round(x / 1e6, 1), "M"),
    ifelse(abs(x) >= 1e3, paste0(round(x / 1e3, 0), "k"),
    as.character(round(x))))))
}

# Clean model name: remove quotes, braces, claude- prefix, simplify
clean_model <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub('["\']', '', x)           # Remove quotes

x <- gsub('[()]', '', x)            # Remove parentheses
  x <- gsub('^claude-', '', x)        # Remove claude- prefix
  x <- trimws(x)                      # Trim whitespace
  x
}

# ccusage_daily may be flat array OR nested {"projects": {...}} (CI fallback)
if (is.list(cc_daily) && !is.data.frame(cc_daily)) {
  if ("projects" %in% names(cc_daily)) {
    parts <- lapply(names(cc_daily$projects), function(p) {
      d <- cc_daily$projects[[p]]
      if (is.data.frame(d) && nrow(d) > 0) { d$project <- shorten_proj(p); d } else NULL
    })
    cc_daily <- do.call(rbind, Filter(Negate(is.null), parts))
  } else {
    cc_daily <- NULL
  }
}
# Normalize column names: raw ccusage uses cacheCreationTokens, cmonitor uses cacheCreation
if (has_rows(cc_daily)) {
  nm <- names(cc_daily)
  if ("cacheCreationTokens" %in% nm && !"cacheCreation" %in% nm)
    names(cc_daily)[nm == "cacheCreationTokens"] <- "cacheCreation"
  if ("cacheReadTokens" %in% nm && !"cacheRead" %in% nm)
    names(cc_daily)[nm == "cacheReadTokens"] <- "cacheRead"
}

# ccusage_blocks may be wrapped in {"blocks": [...]}
if (is.list(cc_blocks) && !is.data.frame(cc_blocks)) {
  cc_blocks <- as_df(cc_blocks$blocks)
}
# Normalize blocks: extract nested tokenCounts, filter out gaps
if (has_rows(cc_blocks)) {
  if ("isGap" %in% names(cc_blocks)) {
    cc_blocks <- cc_blocks[!cc_blocks$isGap, ]
  }
  if ("tokenCounts" %in% names(cc_blocks) && is.data.frame(cc_blocks$tokenCounts)) {
    tc <- cc_blocks$tokenCounts
    if ("inputTokens" %in% names(tc)) cc_blocks$inputTokens <- tc$inputTokens
    if ("outputTokens" %in% names(tc)) cc_blocks$outputTokens <- tc$outputTokens
    if ("cacheCreationInputTokens" %in% names(tc)) cc_blocks$cacheCreation <- tc$cacheCreationInputTokens
    if ("cacheReadInputTokens" %in% names(tc)) cc_blocks$cacheRead <- tc$cacheReadInputTokens
  }
  # models may be a list column — collapse to string
  if ("models" %in% names(cc_blocks) && is.list(cc_blocks$models)) {
    cc_blocks$models <- vapply(cc_blocks$models, function(m) paste(m, collapse = ", "), "")
  }
}

cc_sessions <- as_df(cc_sessions)
gem_daily   <- as_df(gem_daily)
gem_sess    <- as_df(gem_sess)
# Codex data: normalise to data frames; handle empty JSON gracefully
codex_daily  <- as_df(codex_d_raw)
codex_sess   <- as_df(codex_s_raw)
git_commits <- as_df(git_commits)
u_sessions  <- as_df(u_sessions)
u_costs     <- as_df(u_costs)
cb_per_day  <- as_df(cb_per_day)
preds_raw   <- as_df(preds_raw)
cal_buckets <- as_df(cal_buckets)
git_vel     <- as_df(git_vel)
git_timing  <- as_df(git_timing)
git_crisis  <- as_df(git_crisis)
git_churn   <- as_df(git_churn)
git_bugs    <- as_df(git_bugs)
git_todo    <- as_df(git_todo)
git_tags    <- as_df(git_tags)
git_file_growth <- as_df(git_file_growth)
# git_bus is a list with $all_time and $recent_6mo data frames
if (is.list(git_bus) && !is.data.frame(git_bus)) {
  git_bus$all_time <- as_df(git_bus$all_time)
  git_bus$recent_6mo <- as_df(git_bus$recent_6mo)
} else {
  git_bus <- list(all_time = NULL, recent_6mo = NULL)
}

# Parse dates
parse_ts <- function(x) {
  t <- as.POSIXct(x, format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%OS", tz = "UTC")
  na_idx <- is.na(t) & !is.na(x)
  if (any(na_idx)) t[na_idx] <- as.POSIXct(x[na_idx], format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", tz = "UTC")
  t
}

if (has_rows(cc_daily)) {
  cc_daily$date <- as.Date(cc_daily$date)
}
if (has_rows(cc_sessions)) {
  cc_sessions$lastActivity <- as.Date(cc_sessions$lastActivity)
}
if (has_rows(cc_blocks)) {
  cc_blocks$startTime <- parse_ts(cc_blocks$startTime)
  cc_blocks$endTime   <- parse_ts(cc_blocks$endTime)
  cc_blocks$actualEndTime <- parse_ts(cc_blocks$actualEndTime)
  cc_blocks$date <- as.Date(cc_blocks$startTime)
  cc_blocks$hour <- hour(cc_blocks$startTime)
  cc_blocks$wday <- wday(cc_blocks$startTime, label = TRUE)
  eff_end <- coalesce2(cc_blocks$actualEndTime, cc_blocks$endTime)
  cc_blocks$duration_hrs <- as.numeric(difftime(eff_end, cc_blocks$startTime, units = "hours"))
  cc_blocks$cost_per_hr <- ifelse(cc_blocks$duration_hrs > 0,
    round(cc_blocks$costUSD / cc_blocks$duration_hrs, 2), 0)
  cc_blocks$tok_per_hr <- ifelse(cc_blocks$duration_hrs > 0,
    round(cc_blocks$totalTokens / cc_blocks$duration_hrs, 0), 0)
}
if (has_rows(gem_daily)) gem_daily$date <- as.Date(gem_daily$date)
if (has_rows(git_commits)) git_commits$date <- as.Date(git_commits$date)
if (has_rows(git_commits_proj)) git_commits_proj$date <- as.Date(git_commits_proj$date)
if (has_rows(u_sessions)) {
  # Extract date and time separately (WebR POSIXct loses time portion)
  u_sessions$date <- as.Date(substr(u_sessions$started_at, 1, 10))
  u_sessions$time_str <- substr(u_sessions$started_at, 12, 16)  # "HH:MM"
  u_sessions$started_at <- as.POSIXct(u_sessions$started_at, tz = "UTC")
}
if (has_rows(u_costs)) u_costs$date <- as.Date(u_costs$date)
if (has_rows(cb_per_day) && "date" %in% names(cb_per_day)) {
  cb_per_day$date <- as.Date(cb_per_day$date)
}
# cost_per_commit_data date coercion removed (#83 Phase 5) — migrated to DuckDB-WASM
if (has_rows(file_churn_data) && "last_changed_date" %in% names(file_churn_data)) {
  file_churn_data$last_changed_date <- as.Date(file_churn_data$last_changed_date)
}
if (has_rows(gem_sess)) {
  gem_sess$start_time <- as.POSIXct(gem_sess$start_time, tz = "UTC")
  gem_sess$date <- as.Date(gem_sess$start_time)
}
if (has_rows(codex_daily) && "date" %in% names(codex_daily)) {
  codex_daily$date <- as.Date(codex_daily$date)
}
if (has_rows(codex_sess) && "started_at" %in% names(codex_sess)) {
  codex_sess$started_at <- as.POSIXct(codex_sess$started_at, tz = "UTC")
  codex_sess$date <- as.Date(codex_sess$started_at)
}

# Phase B: use canonical_project column where available; fall back to legacy derivation
base_projs <- character(0)
if (has_rows(u_sessions) && "canonical_project" %in% names(u_sessions)) {
  # Use Phase-A canonical_project; rows with NA canonical_project are orphan/worktree — exclude
  u_sessions <- u_sessions[!is.na(u_sessions$canonical_project), ]
  u_sessions$project_short <- u_sessions$canonical_project
  base_projs <- sort(unique(u_sessions$canonical_project))
} else if (has_rows(u_sessions) && "project" %in% names(u_sessions)) {
  # Legacy fallback: derive from project path
  all_proj_short <- sort(unique(shorten_proj(u_sessions$project)))
  base_projs <- all_proj_short[!grepl("/", all_proj_short)]
  u_sessions$project_short <- canonical_proj(shorten_proj(u_sessions$project), base_projs)
  base_projs <- sort(unique(u_sessions$project_short))
}
# Prefer projects_master canonical list over session-derived list
all_projects <- if (length(projects_master_canonical) > 0) projects_master_canonical else base_projs
# Propagate canonical names to derived datasets using Phase-A column when present
if (has_rows(cost_proj)) {
  if ("canonical_project" %in% names(cost_proj)) {
    cost_proj <- cost_proj[!is.na(cost_proj$canonical_project), ]
    cost_proj$project <- cost_proj$canonical_project
  } else if ("project" %in% names(cost_proj)) {
    cost_proj$project <- canonical_proj(shorten_proj(cost_proj$project), base_projs)
  }
}
if (has_rows(cc_daily) && "project" %in% names(cc_daily)) {
  cc_daily$project <- canonical_proj(cc_daily$project, base_projs)
}

all_dates <- c(
  if (has_rows(cc_daily)) cc_daily$date,
  if (has_rows(gem_daily)) gem_daily$date
)
date_min <- if (length(all_dates) > 0) min(all_dates, na.rm = TRUE) else Sys.Date() - 30
date_max <- if (length(all_dates) > 0) max(all_dates, na.rm = TRUE) else Sys.Date()
max_days <- as.numeric(date_max - date_min)

# --- UI -----------------------------------------------------------------------
ui <- page_navbar(
  title = "LLM Telemetry",
  theme = bs_theme(
    bg = "#1a1a1a", fg = "#e0e0e0",
    primary = "#377eb8", secondary = "#555555",
    font_scale = 0.85
  ),
  header = tagList(
    tags$script(src = "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/echarts@5/dist/echarts.min.js"),
    # Mermaid — architecture diagram in Glossary tab (issue #176)
    tags$script(src = "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mermaid@11/dist/mermaid.min.js"),
    # Tippy.js + Popper — body-size hover popups (hover-popup-standard rule, >=1rem)
    tags$script(src = "https://unpkg.com/@popperjs/core@2/dist/umd/popper.min.js"),
    tags$script(src = "https://unpkg.com/tippy.js@6/dist/tippy-bundle.umd.min.js"),
    tags$link(rel = "stylesheet", href = "https://unpkg.com/tippy.js@6/dist/tippy.css"),
    tags$style(HTML("
      /* Architecture diagram Mermaid sizing */
      .arch-mermaid-wrap { min-height: 560px; background:#000000; border-radius:6px; padding:8px; }
      .arch-mermaid-wrap .mermaid svg { max-width: 720px; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
      /* Mermaid node label contrast fix — black text on light node fill (issue: white-on-white) */
      /* Each diagram uses mermaid classDef to force color:#000000 (primary fix). */
      /* This CSS is a backstop covering all label-rendering paths mermaid might use. */
      .arch-mermaid-wrap .mermaid foreignObject div,
      .arch-mermaid-wrap .mermaid foreignObject span,
      .arch-mermaid-wrap .mermaid foreignObject p,
      .arch-mermaid-wrap .mermaid .nodeLabel,
      .arch-mermaid-wrap .mermaid .nodeLabel *,
      .arch-mermaid-wrap .mermaid span.nodeLabel,
      .arch-mermaid-wrap .mermaid p {
        color: #000000 !important;
        white-space: normal !important;
      }
      .arch-mermaid-wrap .mermaid g.node text,
      .arch-mermaid-wrap .mermaid .label text,
      .arch-mermaid-wrap .mermaid text.nodeLabel { fill:#000000 !important; }
      .arch-mermaid-wrap .mermaid .edgeLabel { background-color: #fff !important; color: #000 !important; }
      /* Tippy theme overrides — force >=1rem per hover-popup-standard rule */
      .tippy-box[data-theme~='arch'] { font-size: 1rem !important; max-width: 380px !important; }
      .tippy-box[data-theme~='arch'] a { color: #7cb5ec; }
      /* DL hover targets */
      .arch-dl dt { cursor: help; border-bottom: 1px dashed #555; display: inline-block; }
      .arch-dl dt:hover { color: #7cb5ec; }
    ")),
    tags$script(HTML("
      // Mermaid + Tippy init for architecture diagram (Glossary tab, issue #176)
      // Robust render approach (attempt 3): setInterval polls until element is
      // visible AND mermaid is loaded — catches WASM/tab-show timing regardless
      // of which event fires first. Prior attempts (startOnLoad:false +
      // shown.bs.tab) left the diagram blank because mermaid processed the node
      // while it was 0-width (hidden tab), producing no SVG output.
      var _mermaidInitialized = false;
      var _archIntervalId = null;
      var _archIntervalAttempts = 0;

      function ensureMermaidInit() {
        if (typeof mermaid === 'undefined') { return false; }
        if (!_mermaidInitialized) {
          mermaid.initialize({
            startOnLoad: false,
            securityLevel: 'loose',
            theme: 'base',
            themeVariables: {
              fontSize: '16px',
              background: '#000000',
              primaryColor: '#999999',
              primaryTextColor: '#000000',
              primaryBorderColor: '#CC0000',
              lineColor: '#CC0000',
              secondaryColor: '#999999',
              tertiaryColor: '#999999',
              secondaryTextColor: '#000000',
              tertiaryTextColor: '#000000',
              textColor: '#000000'
            }
          });
          // Store original definition text in data-mmd-src for safe re-render
          document.querySelectorAll('.arch-mermaid-wrap .mermaid').forEach(function(el) {
            if (!el.getAttribute('data-mmd-src')) {
              el.setAttribute('data-mmd-src', el.textContent);
            }
          });
          _mermaidInitialized = true;
        }
        return true;
      }

      function renderArchMermaid() {
        if (typeof mermaid === 'undefined') { return; }
        if (!ensureMermaidInit()) { return; }
        var blocks = document.querySelectorAll('.arch-mermaid-wrap .mermaid');
        blocks.forEach(function(el) {
          // Only render when element is actually visible and has non-zero width
          if (el.offsetParent === null || el.offsetWidth === 0) { return; }
          // Skip if already rendered (has an SVG child)
          if (el.querySelector('svg')) { return; }
          // Restore original definition text (in case mermaid blanked it on hidden render)
          var src = el.getAttribute('data-mmd-src');
          if (src) { el.textContent = src; }
          // Clear stale data-processed flag to allow re-render
          el.removeAttribute('data-processed');
          try {
            mermaid.run({ nodes: [el] });
          } catch(e) {
            console.error('renderArchMermaid error:', e);
          }
        });
      }

      function stopArchInterval() {
        if (_archIntervalId !== null) {
          clearInterval(_archIntervalId);
          _archIntervalId = null;
        }
      }

      function startArchInterval() {
        if (_archIntervalId !== null) { return; }  // already running
        _archIntervalAttempts = 0;
        _archIntervalId = setInterval(function() {
          _archIntervalAttempts++;
          renderArchMermaid();
          // Stop once ALL visible diagrams are rendered OR after ~30 attempts (~18 s)
          var blocks = document.querySelectorAll('.arch-mermaid-wrap .mermaid');
          var allRendered = blocks.length > 0 && Array.from(blocks).every(function(b) {
            return b.offsetParent === null || b.querySelector('svg');
          });
          if (allRendered || _archIntervalAttempts >= 30) { stopArchInterval(); }
        }, 600);
      }

      function initArchTippy() {
        if (typeof tippy === 'undefined') { setTimeout(initArchTippy, 300); return; }
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-arch-tip]').forEach(function(el) {
          if (el._tippy) return;  // already attached
          tippy(el, {
            content: el.getAttribute('data-arch-tip'),
            allowHTML: true,
            placement: 'top',
            theme: 'arch',
            interactive: true,
            appendTo: document.body
          });
        });
      }

      // Trigger 1: Bootstrap 5 tab-show event (covers Reference tab and Glossary inner tab)
      document.addEventListener('shown.bs.tab', function() {
        renderArchMermaid();
        startArchInterval();
      });

      // Trigger 2: shiny:idle (fires repeatedly when Shiny is idle — catches late renders)
      document.addEventListener('shiny:idle', function() {
        renderArchMermaid();
        startArchInterval();
        initArchTippy();
      });

      // Trigger 3: MutationObserver fires when Shinylive injects the app DOM
      var _archObserver = new MutationObserver(function(mutations, obs) {
        var hasApp = document.querySelector('.arch-mermaid-wrap');
        if (hasApp) {
          obs.disconnect();
          // Store src attributes now that DOM is ready
          if (!_mermaidInitialized) { ensureMermaidInit(); }
          setTimeout(renderArchMermaid, 200);
          setTimeout(startArchInterval, 400);
          setTimeout(initArchTippy, 800);
        }
      });
      _archObserver.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });

      // Trigger 4: shiny:connected (belt-and-suspenders)
      document.addEventListener('shiny:connected', function() {
        setTimeout(renderArchMermaid, 400);
        setTimeout(startArchInterval, 600);
        setTimeout(initArchTippy, 600);
      });
    ")),
    # Phase 2B: DuckDB-WASM — initialise once, expose queryAndRenderSessions() globally.
    # Type module gives us top-level await; the Shiny message handler is registered
    # after shiny:connected fires so the message bus is ready.
    # Embedded JS — literal quotes MUST be escaped (single-quoted R string): use \' for each JS '
    # PARQUET_URL: use the same base-path strategy as load_json() in R — origin-absolute
    # "/llmtelemetry/data/v1/sessions.parquet". This avoids Shinylive iframe location
    # ambiguity that made new URL("data/v1/sessions.parquet", window.location.href)
    # resolve to a wrong path when window.location inside the Shinylive context does
    # not end with a directory slash (e.g. ".../index.html" drops "data/" prefix).
    tags$script(type = "module", HTML('
      const PARQUET_URL = window.location.origin + "/llmtelemetry/data/v1/sessions.parquet";
      const COSTS_URL   = window.location.origin + "/llmtelemetry/data/v1/costs.parquet";
      const GIT_URL     = window.location.origin + "/llmtelemetry/data/v1/git_commits.parquet";
      let conn = null;
      try {
        const duckdb = await import("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@duckdb/duckdb-wasm@1.32.0/+esm");
        const bundle = await duckdb.selectBundle(duckdb.getJsDelivrBundles());
        const worker = new Worker(
          URL.createObjectURL(new Blob(
            ["importScripts(\\"" + bundle.mainWorker + "\\");"],
            {type:"text/javascript"}
          ))
        );
        const db = new duckdb.AsyncDuckDB(new duckdb.ConsoleLogger(), worker);
        await db.instantiate(bundle.mainModule, bundle.pthreadWorker);
        await db.registerFileURL(
          "sessions.parquet", PARQUET_URL,
          duckdb.DuckDBDataProtocol.HTTP, false
        );
        await db.registerFileURL(
          "costs.parquet", COSTS_URL,
          duckdb.DuckDBDataProtocol.HTTP, false
        );
        await db.registerFileURL(
          "git_commits.parquet", GIT_URL,
          duckdb.DuckDBDataProtocol.HTTP, false
        );
        conn = await db.connect();
      } catch(initErr) {
        console.error("DuckDB-WASM init failed:", initErr, "PARQUET_URL:", PARQUET_URL);
      }

      let _chart = null;

      window.queryAndRenderSessions = async function(projects, min_date) {
        // "__NONE__" sentinel: user selected "None" — render empty chart without DuckDB query.
        // Apostrophes in project names are escaped by doubling: p.replace(/\'/g, "\'\'")
        if (projects === "__NONE__") {
          const el = document.getElementById("proj_sessions_ec");
          if (!el) return;
          if (!_chart) {
            _chart = echarts.init(el, "dark");
            new ResizeObserver(function() { _chart.resize(); }).observe(el);
          }
          _chart.setOption({ backgroundColor:"#1a1a1a", series:[{type:"bar",data:[]}] }, true);
          return;
        }
        // Graceful empty state if DuckDB-WASM failed to initialise.
        if (!conn) {
          const el = document.getElementById("proj_sessions_ec");
          if (el) {
            if (!_chart) { _chart = echarts.init(el, "dark"); new ResizeObserver(function(){_chart.resize();}).observe(el); }
            _chart.setOption({ backgroundColor:"#1a1a1a",
              title:{text:"Sessions data unavailable",textStyle:{color:"#ccc",fontSize:13}},
              series:[] }, true);
          }
          return;
        }
        // projects is null (All — no IN filter, includes live projects absent from master)
        // or a non-empty Array (specific project selection).
        const filters = ["canonical_project IS NOT NULL"];
        if (Array.isArray(projects) && projects.length > 0)
          filters.push("canonical_project IN (" + projects.map(p => "\'" + p.replace(/\'/g, "\'\'") + "\'").join(",") + ")");
        if (min_date) filters.push("started_at >= \'" + min_date + "\'");
        const r = await conn.query(
          "SELECT canonical_project, COUNT(*)::INTEGER AS n " +
          "FROM \'sessions.parquet\' " +
          "WHERE " + filters.join(" AND ") + " " +
          "GROUP BY canonical_project ORDER BY n DESC"
        );
        const rows = r.toArray().map(row => ({
          p: String(row.canonical_project),
          n: typeof row.n === "bigint" ? Number(row.n) : row.n
        }));
        const el = document.getElementById("proj_sessions_ec");
        if (!el) return;
        if (!_chart) {
          _chart = echarts.init(el, "dark");
          new ResizeObserver(function() { _chart.resize(); }).observe(el);
        }
        const projs = rows.map(function(r){return r.p;}).reverse();
        const ns    = rows.map(function(r){return r.n;}).reverse();
        _chart.setOption({
          backgroundColor:"#1a1a1a",
          tooltip:{trigger:"axis"},
          grid:{left:120,containLabel:false},
          xAxis:{type:"value",name:"Sessions",nameLocation:"middle",nameGap:25,
                 axisLabel:{color:"#ccc"},nameTextStyle:{color:"#ccc"}},
          yAxis:{type:"category",data:projs,axisLabel:{color:"#ccc",fontSize:11}},
          series:[{type:"scatter",data:ns,symbolSize:12,itemStyle:{color:"#377eb8"},
                   label:{show:true,position:"right",color:"#ccc",formatter:"{c}"}}]
        }, true);
      };

      // Shiny bridge: re-query when project filter or date horizon changes
      // --- Conversations Over Time scatter (#83 Phase 2) ---
      // Query sessions.parquet grouped by date — returns [date, n, total_min] triples
      // for the ECharts bubble-scatter in the Sessions > Charts tab.
      let _timeChart = null;
      window.queryAndRenderSessionsTime = async function(projects, min_date) {
        const el = document.getElementById("sess_time_ec");
        if (!el) return;
        if (!_timeChart) {
          _timeChart = echarts.init(el, "dark");
          new ResizeObserver(function() { _timeChart.resize(); }).observe(el);
        }
        if (projects === "__NONE__") {
          _timeChart.setOption({ backgroundColor:"#1a1a1a", series:[{type:"scatter",data:[]}] }, true);
          return;
        }
        if (!conn) {
          _timeChart.setOption({ backgroundColor:"#1a1a1a",
            title:{text:"Sessions data unavailable",textStyle:{color:"#ccc",fontSize:13}},
            series:[] }, true);
          return;
        }
        const filters = ["duration_min > 0", "canonical_project IS NOT NULL"];
        if (Array.isArray(projects) && projects.length > 0)
          filters.push("canonical_project IN (" + projects.map(p => "\'" + p.replace(/\'/g, "\'\'") + "\'").join(",") + ")");
        if (min_date) filters.push("started_at >= \'" + min_date + "\'");
        const r = await conn.query(
          "SELECT CAST(started_at AS DATE)::TEXT AS date, " +
          "COUNT(*)::INTEGER AS n, " +
          "ROUND(SUM(duration_min), 1) AS total_min " +
          "FROM \'sessions.parquet\' " +
          "WHERE " + filters.join(" AND ") + " " +
          "GROUP BY CAST(started_at AS DATE) ORDER BY CAST(started_at AS DATE)"
        );
        const pts = r.toArray().map(row => [
          String(row.date),
          typeof row.n === "bigint" ? Number(row.n) : row.n,
          typeof row.total_min === "bigint" ? Number(row.total_min) : (row.total_min || 0)
        ]);
        _timeChart.setOption({
          backgroundColor: "#1a1a1a",
          tooltip: { trigger: "item", formatter: function(p) {
            return p.data[0] + "<br/>Sessions: " + p.data[1] + "<br/>Total min: " + p.data[2];
          }},
          grid: { containLabel: true },
          xAxis: { type: "time" },
          yAxis: { type: "value", name: "Sessions" },
          series: [{ type: "scatter", data: pts,
            symbolSize: function(d) { return Math.max(5, Math.sqrt(Math.abs(d[2])) * 2); },
            itemStyle: { color: "#377eb8" } }]
        }, true);
      };

      // --- Session Duration by Project (Cleveland dot) --- (#83 Phase 5)
      // Queries sessions.parquet: SUM(duration_min) GROUP BY canonical_project
      let _durChart = null;
      window.queryAndRenderDuration = async function(projects, min_date) {
        const el = document.getElementById("proj_duration_ec");
        if (!el) return;
        if (!_durChart) {
          _durChart = echarts.init(el, "dark");
          new ResizeObserver(function() { _durChart.resize(); }).observe(el);
        }
        if (projects === "__NONE__") {
          _durChart.setOption({ backgroundColor:"#1a1a1a", series:[{type:"scatter",data:[]}] }, true);
          return;
        }
        if (!conn) {
          _durChart.setOption({ backgroundColor:"#1a1a1a",
            title:{text:"Duration data unavailable",textStyle:{color:"#ccc",fontSize:13}},
            series:[] }, true);
          return;
        }
        const filters = ["duration_min > 0", "canonical_project IS NOT NULL"];
        if (Array.isArray(projects) && projects.length > 0)
          filters.push("canonical_project IN (" + projects.map(p => "\'" + p.replace(/\'/g, "\'\'") + "\'").join(",") + ")");
        if (min_date) filters.push("started_at >= \'" + min_date + "\'");
        const r = await conn.query(
          "SELECT canonical_project, ROUND(SUM(duration_min), 1) AS total_min " +
          "FROM \'sessions.parquet\' " +
          "WHERE " + filters.join(" AND ") + " " +
          "GROUP BY canonical_project ORDER BY total_min DESC"
        );
        const rows = r.toArray().map(row => ({
          p: String(row.canonical_project),
          m: typeof row.total_min === "bigint" ? Number(row.total_min) : (row.total_min || 0)
        }));
        // Cleveland dot: ascending order (smallest at top of horizontal axis)
        const projs = rows.map(function(r){return r.p;}).reverse();
        const mins  = rows.map(function(r){return r.m;}).reverse();
        _durChart.setOption({
          backgroundColor:"#1a1a1a",
          tooltip:{trigger:"axis",formatter:function(params){
            return params[0].name + ": " + params[0].value + " min";
          }},
          grid:{left:120,containLabel:false},
          xAxis:{type:"value",name:"Minutes",nameLocation:"middle",nameGap:25,
                 axisLabel:{color:"#ccc"},nameTextStyle:{color:"#ccc"}},
          yAxis:{type:"category",data:projs,axisLabel:{color:"#ccc",fontSize:11}},
          series:[{type:"scatter",data:mins,symbolSize:12,itemStyle:{color:"#4daf4a"},
                   label:{show:true,position:"right",color:"#ccc",formatter:"{c}"}}]
        }, true);
      };

      // --- Cost per Commit Trend (#83 Phase 5) ---
      // Queries costs.parquet JOIN git_commits.parquet to compute cost/commit by
      // project and date. Replaces JSON-fetch from cost_per_commit.json.
      // The granularity parameter is one of: "daily" | "weekly" | "monthly".
      let _cpcChart = null;
      window.queryAndRenderCostPerCommit = async function(projects, min_date, granularity) {
        const el = document.getElementById("cost_per_commit_ec");
        if (!el) return;
        if (!_cpcChart) {
          _cpcChart = echarts.init(el, "dark");
          new ResizeObserver(function() { _cpcChart.resize(); }).observe(el);
        }
        if (projects === "__NONE__") {
          _cpcChart.setOption({ backgroundColor:"#1a1a1a", series:[{type:"line",data:[]}] }, true);
          return;
        }
        if (!conn) {
          _cpcChart.setOption({ backgroundColor:"#1a1a1a",
            title:{text:"Cost-per-commit data unavailable",textStyle:{color:"#ccc",fontSize:13}},
            series:[] }, true);
          return;
        }
        const gran = granularity || "weekly";
        // Build project filter clause
        // Build project filter clause (no table alias prefix — each CTE is unambiguous)
        const projIn = (Array.isArray(projects) && projects.length > 0)
          ? "canonical_project IN (" + projects.map(p => "\'" + p.replace(/\'/g, "\'\'") + "\'").join(",") + ")"
          : null;
        const dateFrom = min_date ? "date >= \'" + min_date + "\'" : null;

        // Aggregate cost and commit count by (project, period), then compute ratio.
        // costs.parquet: canonical_project, date, daily_cost_usd
        // git_commits.parquet: canonical_project, date (one row per commit)
        let periodExprCost, periodExprGit, groupExprCost, groupExprGit;
        if (gran === "monthly") {
          periodExprCost = "strftime(date, \'%Y-%m\')";
          periodExprGit  = "strftime(date, \'%Y-%m\')";
          groupExprCost  = "strftime(date, \'%Y-%m\')";
          groupExprGit   = "strftime(date, \'%Y-%m\')";
        } else if (gran === "weekly") {
          periodExprCost = "strftime(date, \'%Y-W%W\')";
          periodExprGit  = "strftime(date, \'%Y-W%W\')";
          groupExprCost  = "strftime(date, \'%Y-W%W\')";
          groupExprGit   = "strftime(date, \'%Y-W%W\')";
        } else {
          periodExprCost = "date::TEXT";
          periodExprGit  = "date::TEXT";
          groupExprCost  = "date";
          groupExprGit   = "date";
        }
        const costWhere  = ["canonical_project IS NOT NULL"].concat(projIn ? [projIn] : []).concat(dateFrom ? [dateFrom] : []).join(" AND ");
        const gitWhere   = ["canonical_project IS NOT NULL"].concat(projIn ? [projIn] : []).join(" AND ");
        const sql =
          "WITH cost_agg AS (" +
          "  SELECT canonical_project, " + periodExprCost + " AS period, SUM(daily_cost_usd) AS total_cost" +
          "  FROM \'costs.parquet\'" +
          "  WHERE " + costWhere +
          "  GROUP BY canonical_project, " + groupExprCost +
          "), commit_agg AS (" +
          "  SELECT canonical_project, " + periodExprGit + " AS period, COUNT(*) AS n_commits" +
          "  FROM \'git_commits.parquet\'" +
          "  WHERE " + gitWhere +
          "  GROUP BY canonical_project, " + groupExprGit +
          ") SELECT ca.canonical_project AS project, ca.period," +
          "  ROUND(ca.total_cost / NULLIF(cb.n_commits, 0), 2) AS cost_per_commit" +
          " FROM cost_agg ca JOIN commit_agg cb" +
          "   ON ca.canonical_project = cb.canonical_project AND ca.period = cb.period" +
          " WHERE ca.total_cost IS NOT NULL AND cb.n_commits > 0" +
          " ORDER BY ca.period, ca.canonical_project";

        let rows;
        try {
          const r = await conn.query(sql);
          rows = r.toArray().map(function(row) {
            return {
              project: String(row.project),
              period:  String(row.period),
              cpc:     typeof row.cost_per_commit === "bigint" ? Number(row.cost_per_commit) : (row.cost_per_commit || 0)
            };
          });
        } catch(qErr) {
          console.error("queryAndRenderCostPerCommit failed:", qErr);
          _cpcChart.setOption({ backgroundColor:"#1a1a1a",
            title:{text:"Cost-per-commit query error",textStyle:{color:"#ccc",fontSize:13}},
            series:[] }, true);
          return;
        }

        if (rows.length === 0) {
          _cpcChart.setOption({ backgroundColor:"#1a1a1a",
            title:{text:"No cost-per-commit data for selection",textStyle:{color:"#ccc",fontSize:12}},
            series:[] }, true);
          return;
        }

        const xs = Array.from(new Set(rows.map(function(r){return r.period;}))).sort();
        const projs = Array.from(new Set(rows.map(function(r){return r.project;}))).sort();
        const palette = ["#377eb8","#4daf4a","#ff7f00","#e41a1c","#984ea3","#a65628","#f781bf","#999999"];
        const series = projs.map(function(p, i) {
          const vals = xs.map(function(x) {
            const match = rows.find(function(r){return r.project === p && r.period === x;});
            return match ? match.cpc : null;
          });
          return {
            name: p, type: "line", data: I(vals),
            connectNulls: true,
            itemStyle: {color: palette[i % palette.length]}
          };
        });
        _cpcChart.setOption({
          backgroundColor: "#1a1a1a",
          tooltip: {trigger: "axis", formatter: function(params) {
            return params[0].axisValue + "<br/>" +
              params.filter(function(p){return p.value !== null;})
                    .map(function(p){return p.marker + p.seriesName + ": $" + (p.value || 0).toFixed(2);})
                    .join("<br/>");
          }},
          legend: {textStyle:{color:"#ccc"}, top:0},
          grid: {containLabel:true, top:40},
          xAxis: {type:"category", data:xs, axisLabel:{color:"#ccc",rotate:30,fontSize:10}},
          yAxis: {type:"value", name:"Cost per Commit ($)", nameTextStyle:{color:"#ccc"},
                  axisLabel:{color:"#ccc",formatter:function(v){return "$"+v;}}},
          dataZoom: [{type:"slider", bottom:0, height:20,
                      start: Math.max(0, Math.round(100 - 90 * Math.min(1, 90/Math.max(1,xs.length))))
                     }],
          series: series
        }, true);
      };

      function registerHandler() {
        Shiny.addCustomMessageHandler("duckdb_sessions", function(msg) {
          // Pass msg.projects directly: null=All, "__NONE__"=None, Array=specific list
          window.queryAndRenderSessions(msg.projects || null, msg.min_date || null);
        });
        Shiny.addCustomMessageHandler("duckdb_sessions_time", function(msg) {
          window.queryAndRenderSessionsTime(msg.projects || null, msg.min_date || null);
        });
        Shiny.addCustomMessageHandler("duckdb_sessions_duration", function(msg) {
          window.queryAndRenderDuration(msg.projects || null, msg.min_date || null);
        });
        Shiny.addCustomMessageHandler("duckdb_cost_per_commit", function(msg) {
          window.queryAndRenderCostPerCommit(msg.projects || null, msg.min_date || null, msg.granularity || "weekly");
        });
        window.queryAndRenderSessions(null, null);  // initial render (all projects, all dates)
        window.queryAndRenderSessionsTime(null, null);  // initial render for time chart
        window.queryAndRenderDuration(null, null);  // initial render for duration chart
        window.queryAndRenderCostPerCommit(null, null, "weekly");  // initial render for cost-per-commit
      }
      if (window.Shiny && window.Shiny.addCustomMessageHandler) {
        registerHandler();
      } else {
        document.addEventListener("shiny:connected", registerHandler);
      }
    ')),
    tags$style(HTML("
      .bslib-value-box .value-box-value { font-size: 1.4rem !important; white-space: nowrap; }
      .bslib-value-box .value-box-title { font-size: 0.75rem !important; white-space: nowrap; }
      .card { background-color: #222 !important; border-color: #444 !important; cursor: zoom-in; }
      .card-header { background-color: #2a2a2a !important; color: #e0e0e0 !important; font-size: 0.85rem; }
      .card-footer { background-color: #1a1a1a !important; border-color: #333 !important; }
      .sidebar-content { background-color: #222 !important; }
      table.dataTable th, table.dataTable td { white-space: nowrap !important; }
      table.dataTable { color: #e0e0e0 !important; }
      table.dataTable thead th { color: #e0e0e0 !important; background-color: #2a2a2a !important; }
      table.dataTable tbody td { border-color: #444 !important; }
      .dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_filter input { background-color: #333; color: #e0e0e0; border-color: #555; }
      .dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_info, .dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_paginate { color: #ccc !important; }
      .dataTables_scrollBody { max-height: none !important; }
      .card.card-fullscreen {
        position: fixed !important; top: 50% !important; left: 50% !important;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%) !important;
        width: 96vw !important; max-height: 55vh !important; z-index: 99999 !important;
        background: #1a1a1a !important; cursor: zoom-out !important;
        overflow: auto !important; border-radius: 6px !important;
        padding: 10px !important; margin: 0 !important;
        box-shadow: 0 0 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.9) !important;
      }
      .card.card-fullscreen .echart-div {
        width: calc(96vw - 40px) !important; height: 42vh !important;
      }
      .card.card-fullscreen .dataTables_wrapper {
        font-size: 14px; overflow: auto; max-height: 42vh;
      }
      .card-fullscreen-hint {
        position: fixed; top: 8px; right: 20px; color: #888;
        font-size: 12px; z-index: 100000; pointer-events: none;
      }
      /* Click-to-fullscreen overlay for ECharts */
      .fullscreen-overlay {
        position: fixed !important; top: 0 !important; left: 0 !important;
        width: 100vw !important; height: 100vh !important;
        z-index: 99999 !important; background: #000 !important;
        padding: 10px !important; overflow: auto !important; cursor: zoom-out !important;
      }
      .fullscreen-overlay img {
        width: 100% !important; height: 100% !important; object-fit: contain !important;
      }
      /* Clickable value boxes */
      .bslib-value-box { cursor: pointer !important; transition: transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; }
      .bslib-value-box:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(55, 126, 184, 0.3); }
    ")),
    tags$script(HTML("
      var fsCard = null;
      var fsHint = null;
      function exitFullscreen() {
        if (!fsCard) return;
        var card = fsCard;
        card.classList.remove('card-fullscreen');
        fsCard = null;
        if (fsHint) { fsHint.remove(); fsHint = null; }
        // Resize charts back to normal size
        setTimeout(function() {
          card.querySelectorAll('.echart-div').forEach(function(el) {
            var inst = echarts.getInstanceByDom(el);
            if (inst) inst.resize();
          });
        }, 100);
      }
      function enterFullscreen(card) {
        if (fsCard) exitFullscreen();
        fsCard = card;
        card.classList.add('card-fullscreen');
        fsHint = document.createElement('div');
        fsHint.className = 'card-fullscreen-hint';
        fsHint.textContent = 'Click card or press Esc to exit';
        document.body.appendChild(fsHint);
        var dtApi = card.querySelector('.dataTable');
        if (dtApi && dtApi.DataTable) {
          try { dtApi.DataTable().columns.adjust(); } catch(e) {}
        }
        card.querySelectorAll('.echart-div').forEach(function(el) {
          var inst = echarts.getInstanceByDom(el);
          if (inst) inst.resize();
        });
      }
      document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        var card = e.target.closest('.card');
        if (!card) return;
        if (card.querySelector('.value-box-value')) return;
        if (fsCard === card) exitFullscreen();
        else if (!fsCard) enterFullscreen(card);
      });
      document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
        if (e.key === 'Escape') exitFullscreen();
      });
      // Clickable value boxes — navigate to relevant tab
      document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        var vbox = e.target.closest('.bslib-value-box');
        if (!vbox) return;
        var title = vbox.querySelector('.value-box-title');
        if (!title) return;
        var txt = title.textContent.toLowerCase();
        var targetTab = null;
        if (txt.includes('cost')) targetTab = 'Usage';
        else if (txt.includes('token')) targetTab = 'Usage';
        else if (txt.includes('session')) targetTab = 'Usage';
        else if (txt.includes('day')) targetTab = 'Usage';
        else if (txt.includes('commit') || txt.includes('lines')) targetTab = 'Git';
        if (targetTab) {
          // Find and click the nav link for the target tab
          var navLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.navbar-nav .nav-link, .nav-pills .nav-link');
          navLinks.forEach(function(link) {
            if (link.textContent.trim() === targetTab) link.click();
          });
        }
      });
    "))
  ),
  sidebar = sidebar(
    width = 220,
    selectInput("granularity", "Time granularity:",
      choices = c("Daily" = "daily", "Weekly" = "weekly", "Monthly" = "monthly"),
      selected = "weekly"),
    sliderInput("horizon", "Time Horizon (days)",
      min = 1, max = 30, value = 30, step = 1),
    conditionalPanel(
      condition = "input.tabs == 'Usage'",
      selectInput(
        "selected_projects",
        "Projects:",
        choices  = NULL,   # populated server-side from projects_master.json
        selected = "__ALL__",
        multiple = TRUE,
        selectize = FALSE, # classic list-box: ctrl+click for multi-select
        size = 10
      ),
      tags$div(style = "display: flex; gap: 4px; margin-top: 4px;",
        actionButton("sel_all",    "All",    class = "btn-sm btn-outline-secondary"),
        actionButton("sel_none",   "None",   class = "btn-sm btn-outline-secondary"),
        actionButton("sel_invert", "Invert", class = "btn-sm btn-outline-secondary")
      )
    ),
    conditionalPanel(
      condition = "input.tabs == 'Usage' && input.usage_tabs == 'Sessions'",
      numericInput("top_n", "Top N sessions", value = 10, min = 5, max = 50)
    ),
    conditionalPanel(
      condition = "input.tabs == 'Usage' && input.usage_tabs == 'Time Blocks'",
      sliderInput("block_days", "Block window (days)",
        min = 1, max = 60, value = 14, step = 1)
    ),
    conditionalPanel(
      condition = "input.tabs == 'Git'",
      selectInput("commit_project", "Repo",
        choices = c("All repos" = "all"),
        selected = "all")
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Overview", value = "Overview",
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
      card(
        card_header("Overview Summary"),
        tags$table(class = "table table-sm table-dark mb-0",
          tags$thead(tags$tr(tags$th("Metric"), tags$th("Value"))),
          tags$tbody(
            tooltip(
              tags$tr(tags$td("Total Cost"), tags$td(textOutput("vb_cost", inline = TRUE))),
              "Sum of API charges. Primary: CodexBar (Claude + OpenAI). Gemini added separately (not in CodexBar coverage)."
            ),
            tooltip(
              tags$tr(tags$td("Δ% (ccusage cross-check)", class = "text-muted small"),
                       tags$td(textOutput("vb_cc_delta", inline = TRUE),
                               class = "text-muted small")),
              "Δ% = (ccusage − CodexBar) / CodexBar, Claude-only rows. Cross-check only (#281)."
            ),
            tooltip(
              tags$tr(tags$td("Total Tokens"), tags$td(textOutput("vb_tokens", inline = TRUE))),
              "Sum of input + output + cache tokens. Primary: CodexBar (Claude + OpenAI). Gemini added separately."
            ),
            tooltip(
              tags$tr(tags$td("Active Days"), tags$td(textOutput("vb_days", inline = TRUE))),
              "Days with at least one API call in the selected time horizon"
            ),
            tooltip(
              tags$tr(tags$td("Sessions"), tags$td(textOutput("vb_sessions", inline = TRUE))),
              "Claude Code sessions from unified.duckdb telemetry"
            )
          )
        ),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small",
          "Key metrics for the selected time horizon. Costs: primary source is ",
          tags$code("codexbar_cost_per_day.json"),
          " (Claude + OpenAI on a single rollup); Gemini added separately from ",
          tags$code("gemini_usage.duckdb"),
          ". ccusage is shown as a Δ% cross-check (#281 Phase 3b — kept as a fallback through 2026-09-02). Sessions from Claude Code hook telemetry.")
      )
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("Source Summary"), DTOutput("overview_table"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Cost, tokens, and session counts per data source"))
    ),
    layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("Daily Cost (All Sources)"), uiOutput("overview_cost_ts"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Daily cost time series combining Claude, Gemini, and Codex usage"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Usage", value = "Usage",
    navset_tab(id = "usage_tabs",
      nav_panel("Cost Trends", value = "Cost Trends",
        layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
          card(card_header("Daily Cost by Project (Estimated)"), uiOutput("cost_by_project"),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small",
              "Estimated daily cost by project using session duration as allocation key. ",
              "Source: cost_by_project_estimated.json (session-weighted from unified.duckdb); ",
              "per-project CodexBar attribution deferred to Phase 4 (no session→project join available).")),
          card(card_header("Cumulative Cost"), uiOutput("cost_cumulative"),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small",
              "Running total of cost over time. ",
              "Primary source: codexbar_cost_per_day.json (#281 Phase 3a). ",
              "Falls back to session-weighted estimate when CodexBar data absent."))
        ),
        layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
          card(card_header("Weekly Cost by Source"), uiOutput("cost_weekly"),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small",
              "Weekly cost grouped by tool. ",
              "Claude: primary source codexbar_cost_per_day.json, fallback legacy_ccusage_daily.json. ",
              "Gemini: gemini_daily.json. Codex: codex_daily.json.")),
          card(card_header("Weekly Cost by Model"), uiOutput("cost_by_model"),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small",
              "Weekly cost by model variant. ",
              "Primary source: codexbar_cost_per_day.json (one row per date×model). ",
              "Falls back to ccusage modelsUsed field when CodexBar absent."))
        ),
        layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
          card(card_header("Cost per Commit Trend"),
            div(id = "cost_per_commit_ec", style = "height:350px;"),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Estimated cost per commit (USD) over time by project. Powered by DuckDB-WASM (costs.parquet × git_commits.parquet). Lower = more efficient sessions per code change. Granularity toggle applies."))
        ),
        layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
          card(card_header("Cross-Tool Daily Cost (Claude vs Codex vs Gemini)"),
            uiOutput("cross_tool_daily_cost"),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small",
              "Daily API spend (USD) across all three tools. ",
              "Claude: codexbar_cost_per_day.json (primary, #281 Phase 3a); falls back to legacy_ccusage_daily.json. ",
              "Codex: codex_daily.json (est_cost_usd). Gemini: gemini_daily.json (total_cost). ",
              "Time horizon slider applies. Absent or zero data for a tool renders gracefully without error."))
        ),
        layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
          card(
            card_header("Session Cost vs roborev Review Cost (#146 Q20)"),
            tags$div(class = "p-3", style = "color: #e0e0e0; font-size: 0.9em;",
              tags$p(
                "Stacked area chart: session execution cost (blue) vs roborev review cost (green). ",
                "Session cost = daily Claude API spend (opus + sonnet + haiku) from unified_costs. ",
                "Review cost = roborev_agent_performance.total_cost_usd — not yet instrumented ",
                "(shows zero until tracking lands). A healthy ratio: review cost should be ",
                "<10–20% of session cost."
              )
            ),
            uiOutput("rv_vsr_chart"),
            tags$table(class = "table table-sm table-dark mt-2 mb-0",
              tags$thead(tags$tr(tags$th("Metric"), tags$th("Value"))),
              tags$tbody(
                tags$tr(tags$td("Session cost (all-time)"),
                        tags$td(textOutput("rv_vsr_session_total", inline = TRUE))),
                tags$tr(tags$td("Review cost (all-time)"),
                        tags$td(textOutput("rv_vsr_review_total", inline = TRUE))),
                tags$tr(tags$td("Review/session ratio"),
                        tags$td(textOutput("rv_vsr_pct", inline = TRUE)))
              )
            ),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small",
              "Session cost sourced from unified_costs.json (total daily Claude API spend: opus+sonnet+haiku). ",
              "Review cost sourced from roborev_agent_performance.total_cost_usd (not yet instrumented as of 2026-05-30). ",
              "Healthy target: review overhead <10-20% of session cost. ",
              "Source: roborev_vs_session_cost.json from unified.duckdb.")
          )
        ),
        # --- Validation Health card (2e): CodexBar vs ccusage deficit % ---------
        layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
          card(
            card_header("Validation Health: CodexBar vs ccusage"),
            uiOutput("validation_health_card"),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small",
              "deficit_pct = (CodexBar primary − ccusage cross-check) / ccusage × 100. ",
              "Positive = CodexBar reports more spend (expected: CodexBar captures more providers). ",
              "Negative = ccusage reports more (investigate). ",
              "Source: unified_costs.json (primary + cross_check + deficit_pct columns, #281 Phase 2c).")
          )
        ),
        # --- Cross-check (ccusage) accordion (3b) --------------------------------
        # Legacy ccusage charts moved here per #281 Phase 3b.
        # These are cross-check / validation views; CodexBar is now the primary source.
        # Planned for deprecation once CodexBar telemetry stabilises.
        layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
          accordion(
            open = FALSE,
            accordion_panel(
              "Cross-check (ccusage) — planned deprecation",
              tags$p(class = "text-muted small mb-2",
                tags$strong("Note: "),
                "These charts use legacy ccusage data (legacy_ccusage_daily.json / legacy_ccusage_blocks.json) ",
                "as a cross-check against the CodexBar primary source above. ",
                "They are provided for validation only and will be removed once CodexBar telemetry ",
                "has been stable for 30 days. Source: legacy_ccusage_daily.json."
              ),
              layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
                card(
                  card_header("ccusage Daily Cost (cross-check)"),
                  uiOutput("cc_daily_cost_xcheck"),
                  card_footer(class = "text-muted small",
                    "Cross-check view: ccusage totalCost from legacy_ccusage_daily.json. ",
                    "Compare against CodexBar Cumulative Cost above to validate alignment.")
                ),
                card(
                  card_header("ccusage Weekly Cost by Model (cross-check)"),
                  uiOutput("cc_weekly_model_xcheck"),
                  card_footer(class = "text-muted small",
                    "Cross-check view: ccusage cost split by Claude model from legacy_ccusage_daily.json. ",
                    "Validates CodexBar per-model breakdown above.")
                )
              )
            )
          )
        )
      ),
      nav_panel("Token Analysis", value = "Token Analysis",
        layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
          card(card_header("Daily Tokens"), uiOutput("token_daily"),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Daily token consumption across all sources"))
        ),
        layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
          card(card_header("Token Composition"), uiOutput("token_comp"),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Stacked bars: input, output, cache-create, and cache-read tokens")),
          card(card_header("Weekly Tokens by Source"), uiOutput("token_weekly"),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Weekly token usage by source — Claude, Gemini, and Codex"))
        )
      ),
      nav_panel("Time Blocks", value = "Time Blocks",
        layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
          card(card_header("Block Activity"), DTOutput("block_table"),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small",
              "Claude coding blocks with cost and efficiency metrics. ",
              "Source: legacy_ccusage_blocks.json. ",
              "Provider-error blocks (error_kind == 'provider') are excluded (#277 sub-task E)."))
        ),
        layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
          card(card_header("Block Timeline"), uiOutput("block_timeline"),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Cost per block, dot size = duration")),
          card(card_header("Hourly Activity Heatmap"), uiOutput("block_heatmap"),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Cost heatmap by day of week and hour"))
        )
      ),
      nav_panel("Sessions", value = "Sessions",
        navset_pill(
          nav_panel("Charts",
            layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
              card(
                card_header("Sessions Summary"),
                tags$table(class = "table table-sm table-dark mb-0",
                  tags$thead(tags$tr(tags$th("Metric"), tags$th("Value"))),
                  tags$tbody(
                    tooltip(
                      tags$tr(tags$td("API Conversations"), tags$td(textOutput("vb_sess_count", inline = TRUE))),
                      "Count of Claude Code conversations (each restart = new session)"
                    ),
                    tooltip(
                      tags$tr(tags$td("Total Duration"), tags$td(textOutput("vb_sess_duration", inline = TRUE))),
                      "Sum of all conversation durations (minutes)"
                    ),
                    tooltip(
                      tags$tr(tags$td("Avg Duration"), tags$td(textOutput("vb_sess_avg", inline = TRUE))),
                      "Average conversation length (minutes)"
                    )
                  )
                ),
                card_footer(class = "text-muted small",
                  "Session counts from Claude Code hook telemetry (unified.duckdb). A session = one continuous coding session; each restart or context compaction creates a new entry.")
              )
            ),
            layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
              card(card_header("Conversation Duration Distribution"), uiOutput("sess_hist"),
                card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Histogram of API conversation durations (minutes)")),
              card(card_header("Conversations Over Time"),
                tags$div(id="sess_time_ec", class="echart-div", style="width:100%;height:300px;"),
                card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Daily conversation count, bubble size = total minutes · powered by DuckDB-WASM"))
            )
          ),
          nav_panel("Tables",
            layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
              card(card_header("Recent API Conversations"), DTOutput("sess_claude"),
                card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "⚠ These are API conversations, not work sessions. Each Claude Code restart = new conversation. Short durations are normal.")),
              card(card_header("Top Gemini Sessions"), DTOutput("sess_gemini"),
                card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Most expensive Gemini sessions by total cost"))
            )
          )
        )
      ),
      nav_panel("By Project", value = "By Project",
        navset_pill(
          nav_panel("Overview",
            layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
              card(card_header("Estimated Cost by Project"), uiOutput("proj_cost_total"),
                card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Session-weighted cost estimate (⚠ approximate)")),
              card(card_header("Sessions by Project"),
                tags$div(id="proj_sessions_ec", class="echart-div", style="width:100%;height:300px;"),
                card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Session count per project · powered by DuckDB-WASM"))
            )
          ),
          nav_panel("Trends",
            layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
              card(card_header("Daily Cost Trend by Project"), uiOutput("proj_cost_daily"),
                card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Stacked area chart of estimated daily costs"))
            ),
            layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
              card(card_header("Cumulative Daily Cost Trend by Project"), uiOutput("proj_cost_cumulative"),
                card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Running total of estimated daily costs by project"))
            )
          ),
          nav_panel("Details",
            layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
              card(card_header("Session Duration by Project"),
                tags$div(id="proj_duration_ec", class="echart-div", style="width:100%;height:300px;"),
                card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Total session minutes per project · powered by DuckDB-WASM")),
              card(card_header("Cost Share by Date"), uiOutput("proj_share_heatmap"),
                card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Heatmap: project cost share by date"))
            ),
            layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
              card(card_header("Weekly Commit Heatmap"), uiOutput("proj_weekly_heatmap"),
                card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Weekly commit counts across tracked repos. X = ISO week, Y = project, colour = commit count. Default view: last 13 weeks."))
            )
          )
        )
      )
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Git", value = "Git",
    navset_tab(
      nav_panel("Velocity",
        layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
          card(min_height = "400px",
            card_header("Git Summary"),
            tags$table(class = "table table-sm table-dark mb-0",
              tags$thead(tags$tr(tags$th("Metric"), tags$th("Value"))),
              tags$tbody(
                tooltip(
                  tags$tr(tags$td("Total Commits"), tags$td(textOutput("vb_commits", inline = TRUE))),
                  "Git commits for selected repo (or all tracked repos)"
                ),
                tooltip(
                  tags$tr(tags$td("Median Lines"), tags$td(textOutput("vb_median_lines", inline = TRUE))),
                  "Median lines changed per commit (additions + deletions)"
                ),
                tooltip(
                  tags$tr(tags$td("Mean Lines"), tags$td(textOutput("vb_mean_lines", inline = TRUE))),
                  "Mean lines changed per commit (additions + deletions)"
                )
              )
            ),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small",
              "Aggregated from tracked git repos (llm, llmtelemetry, irishbuoys, footbet). Use the Repo filter in the sidebar to drill into a single repo.")
          )
        ),
        layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
          card(min_height = "400px", card_header("Commits by Repo"), DTOutput("commits_by_proj"),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small",
              "All tracked repos — commits, lines added/deleted. Use Repo filter in sidebar to drill down."))
        ),
        layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
          card(min_height = "400px", card_header("Lines Changed per Commit"), uiOutput("commit_hist"),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Distribution of total lines changed per commit (selected repo)"))
        )
      ),
      nav_panel("Commit Patterns",
        layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
          card(min_height = "400px", card_header("Lines Changed Over Time"), uiOutput("commit_scatter_time"),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Lines changed per commit over time, sized by files changed")),
          card(min_height = "400px", card_header("Additions vs Deletions"), uiOutput("commit_scatter_add_del"),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Lines added vs deleted per commit"))
        ),
        layout_columns(col_widths = c(6, 6),
          card(min_height = "400px", card_header("Velocity Trend"), uiOutput("rh_velocity"),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Commits per month")),
          card(min_height = "400px", card_header("Commit Timing Heatmap"), uiOutput("rh_timing"),
            card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "When commits happen — hour vs day of week"))
        ),
        layout_columns(col_widths = c(12),
```
