```{shinylive-r}
  safe_ce_period <- function(period, key, fmt = "%s", default = "—") {
    raw <- roborev_cadence_efficacy_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw)) return(default)
    p <- raw[[period]]
    if (is.null(p) || !key %in% names(p)) return(default)
    v <- p[[key]]
    if (is.null(v) || (length(v) == 1L && is.na(v))) return(default)
    tryCatch(sprintf(fmt, v), error = function(e) default)
  }

  output$rv_ce_before_created   <- renderText(safe_ce_period("before", "reviews_created", "%d"))
  output$rv_ce_before_passed    <- renderText(safe_ce_period("before", "reviews_passed",  "%d"))
  output$rv_ce_before_autoclosed <- renderText(safe_ce_period("before", "reviews_autoclosed", "%d"))
  output$rv_ce_before_days      <- renderText(safe_ce_period("before", "n_days", "%d"))
  output$rv_ce_before_rate      <- renderText({
    v <- safe_ce_period("before", "pass_rate")
    if (v == "—") return("—")
    r <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(v))
    if (is.na(r)) return("—")
    sprintf("%.1f%%", r * 100)
  })
  output$rv_ce_after_created    <- renderText(safe_ce_period("after", "reviews_created", "%d"))
  output$rv_ce_after_passed     <- renderText(safe_ce_period("after", "reviews_passed",  "%d"))
  output$rv_ce_after_autoclosed <- renderText(safe_ce_period("after", "reviews_autoclosed", "%d"))
  output$rv_ce_after_days       <- renderText(safe_ce_period("after", "n_days", "%d"))
  output$rv_ce_after_rate       <- renderText({
    v <- safe_ce_period("after", "pass_rate")
    if (v == "—") return("—")
    r <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(v))
    if (is.na(r)) return("—")
    sprintf("%.1f%%", r * 100)
  })

  output$rv_cadence_chart <- renderUI({
    raw <- roborev_cadence_efficacy_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw))
      return(ec_empty("roborev_cadence_efficacy.json not yet available", h = "340px"))
    daily_raw <- raw$daily
    if (is.null(daily_raw) || length(daily_raw) == 0L)
      return(ec_empty("No daily cadence data available yet", h = "340px"))

    # Normalise: fromJSON(simplifyDataFrame=TRUE) returns data.frame; list-of-lists also accepted.
    ddf <- if (is.data.frame(daily_raw)) {
      daily_raw
    } else {
      do.call(rbind, lapply(daily_raw, function(r) {
        data.frame(
          date               = as.character(r$date),
          reviews_created    = as.integer(r$reviews_created),
          reviews_passed     = as.integer(r$reviews_passed),
          reviews_autoclosed = as.integer(if (!is.null(r$reviews_autoclosed)) r$reviews_autoclosed else 0L),
          pass_rate          = as.numeric(r$pass_rate),
          period             = as.character(r$period),
          stringsAsFactors   = FALSE
        )
      }))
    }
    if (!all(c("date", "reviews_created", "pass_rate") %in% names(ddf)) || nrow(ddf) == 0L)
      return(ec_empty("Cadence efficacy data malformed", h = "340px"))

    ddf$date            <- as.character(ddf$date)
    ddf$reviews_created <- as.integer(ddf$reviews_created)
    ddf$pass_rate       <- as.numeric(ddf$pass_rate)
    ddf <- ddf[order(ddf$date), ]

    split_date <- as.character(if (!is.null(raw$cadence_split_date)) raw$cadence_split_date else "2026-05-21")

    # Total weeks span for range slider (default last 3 months)
    n_days_total <- nrow(ddf)
    dz_start <- if (n_days_total > 90) round(100 * (1 - 90 / n_days_total)) else 0

    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "axis"),
      legend  = list(
        bottom = 30,
        textStyle = list(color = "#ccc"),
        data = list("Daily created", "Pass rate %")
      ),
      toolbox = list(feature = list(
        dataZoom = list(yAxisIndex = "none"),
        restore  = list(),
        saveAsImage = list()
      )),
      dataZoom = list(
        list(type = "inside", start = dz_start, end = 100, filterMode = "filter"),
        list(type = "slider", start = dz_start, end = 100, bottom = 5,  filterMode = "filter")
      ),
      grid = list(containLabel = TRUE, bottom = 80),
      xAxis = list(
        type = "category",
        data = I(ddf$date),
        axisLabel = list(rotate = 30, color = "#ccc"),
        name = "Date",
        nameLocation = "middle",
        nameGap = 45,
        nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc")
      ),
      yAxis = list(
        list(
          type = "value",
          name = "Reviews created",
          nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc"),
          axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc")
        ),
        list(
          type = "value",
          name = "Pass rate %",
          min  = 0,
          max  = 1,
          nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc"),
          axisLabel = list(
            color = "#ccc",
            formatter = DT::JS("function(v){ return (v*100).toFixed(0)+'%'; }")
          )
        )
      ),
      series = list(
        list(
          name      = "Daily created",
          type      = "line",
          yAxisIndex = 0,
          data      = I(ddf$reviews_created),
          smooth    = FALSE,
          itemStyle = list(color = "#4ea8de"),
          lineStyle = list(color = "#4ea8de", width = 2),
          areaStyle = list(color = "rgba(78,168,222,0.12)"),
          markLine  = list(
            silent = TRUE,
            data   = list(list(
              name      = "Cadence reduction",
              xAxis     = split_date,
              lineStyle = list(color = "#ffd93d", width = 2, type = "solid"),
              label     = list(
                formatter = "Cadence\nreduction",
                color     = "#ffd93d",
                fontSize  = 10
              )
            ))
          )
        ),
        list(
          name      = "Pass rate %",
          type      = "line",
          yAxisIndex = 1,
          data      = I(ddf$pass_rate),
          smooth    = FALSE,
          itemStyle = list(color = "#69d4a0"),
          lineStyle = list(color = "#69d4a0", width = 2, type = "dashed")
        )
      )
    ), h = "340px",
    aria_label = paste0(
      "Two-segment line chart: daily roborev review volume (blue) and pass rate (green dashed) ",
      "before and after the cadence reduction on ", split_date, ". ",
      "Yellow vertical marker at split date. ",
      "Range slider defaults to last 3 months."
    ))
  })

  # --- Severity Threshold History panel (#146 Q8) ------------------------------
  # Step chart: threshold level (right axis) + autoclosed_severity per day (left axis).
  # Annotated step changes with date + new_threshold label.
  # Source: roborev_threshold_history.json.
  roborev_threshold_history_raw <- load_json("roborev_threshold_history.json")

  # Map threshold level string -> numeric rank for the step axis
  threshold_rank <- function(x) {
    lookup <- c("low" = 1L, "medium" = 2L, "high" = 3L, "critical" = 4L)
    # Return 0 for NA, empty string, or unknown levels
    result <- rep(0L, length(x))
    known  <- !is.na(x) & nzchar(x) & x %in% names(lookup)
    result[known] <- lookup[x[known]]
    result
  }

  output$rv_threshold_chart <- renderUI({
    raw <- roborev_threshold_history_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw))
      return(ec_empty("roborev_threshold_history.json not yet available", h = "340px"))

    # Daily autoclosed series
    ac_raw <- raw$daily_autoclosed
    if (is.null(ac_raw) || length(ac_raw) == 0L)
      return(ec_empty("No daily autoclosed-severity data available yet", h = "340px"))

    acdf <- if (is.data.frame(ac_raw)) {
      ac_raw
    } else {
      do.call(rbind, lapply(ac_raw, function(r) {
        data.frame(
          date                        = as.character(r$date),
          reviews_autoclosed_severity = as.integer(r$reviews_autoclosed_severity),
          reviews_created             = as.integer(r$reviews_created),
          stringsAsFactors            = FALSE
        )
      }))
    }
    if (!all(c("date", "reviews_autoclosed_severity") %in% names(acdf)) || nrow(acdf) == 0L)
      return(ec_empty("Threshold history data malformed", h = "340px"))
    acdf <- acdf[order(acdf$date), ]

    # Threshold step series: convert to same date axis as autoclosed
    ts_raw <- raw$threshold_steps
    ts_dates <- if (!is.null(ts_raw) && length(ts_raw) > 0L) {
      if (is.data.frame(ts_raw)) ts_raw else {
        do.call(rbind, lapply(ts_raw, function(r) {
          data.frame(date = as.character(r$date),
                     new_threshold = as.character(r$new_threshold),
                     n_repos = as.integer(r$n_repos),
                     stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
        }))
      }
    } else {
      data.frame(date = character(0), new_threshold = character(0),
                 n_repos = integer(0), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    }

    # Build step series aligned to the autoclosed date axis
    all_dates  <- acdf$date
    step_level <- character(length(all_dates))
    step_rank  <- numeric(length(all_dates))
    current_th <- ""
    j <- 1L
    ts_sorted  <- ts_dates[order(ts_dates$date), , drop = FALSE]
    for (i in seq_along(all_dates)) {
      while (j <= nrow(ts_sorted) && ts_sorted$date[j] <= all_dates[i]) {
        current_th <- ts_sorted$new_threshold[j]
        j <- j + 1L
      }
      step_level[i] <- current_th
      step_rank[i]  <- threshold_rank(current_th)
    }

    # Mark-line annotations for each step change
    markline_data <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(ts_sorted)), function(i) {
      list(
        name  = paste0(ts_sorted$new_threshold[i]),
        xAxis = ts_sorted$date[i],
        lineStyle = list(color = "#ffd93d", width = 1, type = "dashed"),
        label = list(
          formatter = paste0(ts_sorted$new_threshold[i]),
          color = "#ffd93d",
          fontSize = 10
        )
      )
    })

    n_days_th <- nrow(acdf)
    dz_start_th <- if (n_days_th > 90) round(100 * (1 - 90 / n_days_th)) else 0

    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "axis"),
      legend  = list(
        bottom = 30,
        textStyle = list(color = "#ccc"),
        data = list("Autoclosed by severity", "Threshold level")
      ),
      toolbox = list(feature = list(
        dataZoom = list(yAxisIndex = "none"),
        restore  = list(),
        saveAsImage = list()
      )),
      dataZoom = list(
        list(type = "inside", start = dz_start_th, end = 100, filterMode = "filter"),
        list(type = "slider", start = dz_start_th, end = 100, bottom = 5, filterMode = "filter")
      ),
      grid = list(containLabel = TRUE, bottom = 80),
      xAxis = list(
        type = "category",
        data = I(acdf$date),
        axisLabel = list(rotate = 30, color = "#ccc"),
        name = "Date",
        nameLocation = "middle",
        nameGap = 45,
        nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc")
      ),
      yAxis = list(
        list(
          type = "value",
          name = "Autoclosed (severity)",
          nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc"),
          axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc")
        ),
        list(
          type = "value",
          name = "Threshold level",
          min  = 0,
          max  = 4,
          nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc"),
          axisLabel = list(
            color = "#ccc",
            formatter = DT::JS(
              "function(v){ var m={0:'',1:'low',2:'medium',3:'high',4:'critical'}; return m[v]||''; }"
            )
          )
        )
      ),
      series = list(
        list(
          name      = "Autoclosed by severity",
          type      = "bar",
          yAxisIndex = 0,
          data      = I(acdf$reviews_autoclosed_severity),
          itemStyle = list(color = "#f08080"),
          emphasis  = list(itemStyle = list(color = "#ff5555")),
          markLine  = if (length(markline_data) > 0L) {
            list(silent = TRUE, data = markline_data)
          } else {
            list(data = list())
          }
        ),
        list(
          name      = "Threshold level",
          type      = "line",
          yAxisIndex = 1,
          data      = I(step_rank),
          step      = "start",
          smooth    = FALSE,
          itemStyle = list(color = "#ffd93d"),
          lineStyle = list(color = "#ffd93d", width = 2),
          symbol    = "none"
        )
      )
    ), h = "340px",
    aria_label = paste0(
      "Combined chart: daily count of reviews auto-closed by severity threshold (red bars, left axis) ",
      "and the effective severity threshold level over time (yellow step line, right axis). ",
      "Dashed vertical markers annotate each threshold change event. ",
      "Range slider defaults to last 3 months. ",
      "Data sourced from roborev_threshold_changes and roborev_daily_metrics in unified.duckdb."
    ))
  })

  # --- Agent Pass Rate panel (#146 Q10) ----------------------------------------
  # Cleveland dot chart: pass rate per agent, sorted ascending (lowest at bottom).
  # KPI table: agent | reviews | pass-rate | pass | fail | error | cost/review.
  # Source: roborev_agent_perf.json {agents:[{agent,n_runs,pass_rate,...}]}.
  safe_ap <- function(raw) {
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw)) return(NULL)
    agents <- raw$agents
    if (is.null(agents)) return(NULL)
    # load_json() uses fromJSON(simplifyDataFrame = TRUE), so a JSON array of
    # objects arrives as a data.frame, not a list-of-lists. lapply() over a
    # data.frame iterates its columns (atomic vectors), so r$agent would throw
    # "$ operator is invalid for atomic vectors". Accept either shape.
    df <- if (is.data.frame(agents)) {
      if (nrow(agents) == 0L) return(NULL)
      agents
    } else if (length(agents) > 0L) {
      do.call(rbind, lapply(agents, function(r) {
        data.frame(
          agent               = as.character(r$agent),
          n_runs              = as.integer(r$n_runs),
          pass_count          = as.integer(r$pass_count),
          fail_count          = as.integer(r$fail_count),
          error_count         = as.integer(r$error_count),
          pass_rate           = as.numeric(r$pass_rate),
          cost_per_review_usd = if (!is.null(r$cost_per_review_usd)) as.numeric(r$cost_per_review_usd) else NA_real_,
          stringsAsFactors    = FALSE
        )
      }))
    } else {
      return(NULL)
    }
    # Normalise column names/types from whichever shape arrived.
    pick_num <- function(col) if (col %in% names(df)) as.numeric(df[[col]]) else NA_real_
    pick_int <- function(col) if (col %in% names(df)) as.integer(df[[col]]) else NA_integer_
    cost <- if ("cost_per_review_usd" %in% names(df)) as.numeric(df[["cost_per_review_usd"]])
            else if ("cost_per_review" %in% names(df)) as.numeric(df[["cost_per_review"]])
            else NA_real_
    data.frame(
      agent           = as.character(df$agent),
      n_runs          = pick_int("n_runs"),
      pass_count      = pick_int("pass_count"),
      fail_count      = pick_int("fail_count"),
      error_count     = pick_int("error_count"),
      pass_rate       = pick_num("pass_rate"),
      cost_per_review = cost,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }

  output$rv_agent_perf_chart <- renderUI({
    ap <- safe_ap(roborev_agent_perf_raw)
    if (is.null(ap))
      return(ec_empty("No agent performance data yet — roborev_agent_perf.json not deployed", h = "250px"))
    # Sort ascending for Cleveland dot (lowest at bottom)
    ap <- ap[order(ap$pass_rate, decreasing = FALSE), ]
    n_agents   <- nrow(ap)
    total_runs <- sum(ap$n_runs)
    best_agent <- ap$agent[which.max(ap$pass_rate)]
    best_rate  <- round(max(ap$pass_rate) * 100, 1)
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(
        trigger = "axis",
        axisPointer = list(type = "shadow"),
        formatter  = DT::JS(
          "function(params) {",
          "  var d = params[0];",
          "  return d.name + '<br/>Pass rate: ' + (d.value * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';",
          "}"
        )
      ),
      grid = list(left = 110, containLabel = FALSE),
      xAxis = list(
        type = "value",
        name = "Pass rate",
        nameLocation = "middle", nameGap = 25,
        min = 0, max = 1,
        axisLabel = list(
          color = "#ccc",
          formatter = DT::JS("function(v){ return (v*100).toFixed(0)+'%'; }")
        ),
        nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc")
      ),
      yAxis = list(
        type = "category",
        data = I(ap$agent),
        axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc", fontSize = 12)
      ),
      series = list(list(
        type       = "scatter",
        data       = I(ap$pass_rate),
        symbolSize = 14,
        itemStyle  = list(color = "#4ea8de")   # primary blue (accessibility palette)
      ))
    ), h = "250px",
    aria_label = paste0(
      "Cleveland dot chart: roborev review agent pass rate. ",
      n_agents, " agents, ", total_runs, " total reviews. ",
      "Best performing agent: ", best_agent, " at ", best_rate, "% pass rate. ",
      "Data sourced from roborev_agent_performance table in unified.duckdb."
    ))
  })

  output$rv_agent_perf_table <- renderUI({
    ap <- safe_ap(roborev_agent_perf_raw)
    if (is.null(ap)) {
      return(tags$tbody(tags$tr(tags$td(colspan = "7", "No data yet"))))
    }
    # Sort descending by pass_rate for table (best first)
    ap <- ap[order(ap$pass_rate, decreasing = TRUE), ]
    fmt_cost <- function(x) {
      if (is.na(x)) "—" else sprintf("$%.4f", x)
    }
    rows <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(ap)), function(i) {
      r <- ap[i, , drop = FALSE]
      tags$tr(
        tags$td(r$agent),
        tags$td(formatC(r$n_runs,      format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(sprintf("%.1f%%", r$pass_rate * 100)),
        tags$td(formatC(r$pass_count,  format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(formatC(r$fail_count,  format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(formatC(r$error_count, format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(fmt_cost(r$cost_per_review))
      )
    })
    tags$tbody(rows)
  })

  # --- Review Backlog Age panel (#146 Q15) -------------------------------------
  # KPI text outputs from roborev_backlog_age.json top-level fields.
  safe_ba <- function(key, fmt = "%s", default = "—") {
    raw <- roborev_backlog_age_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw)) return(default)
    v <- raw[[key]]
    if (is.null(v) || (length(v) == 1 && is.na(v))) return(default)
    tryCatch(sprintf(fmt, v), error = function(e) default)
  }

  output$rv_ba_n_open <- renderText(safe_ba("n_open", "%d"))
  output$rv_ba_median <- renderText({
    v <- safe_ba("median_hours")
    if (v == "—") return("—")
    h <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(v))
    if (is.na(h)) return("—")
    if (h < 24) sprintf("%.1f h", h) else sprintf("%.1f d", h / 24)
  })
  output$rv_ba_p90 <- renderText({
    v <- safe_ba("p90_hours")
    if (v == "—") return("—")
    h <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(v))
    if (is.na(h)) return("—")
    if (h < 24) sprintf("%.1f h", h) else sprintf("%.1f d", h / 24)
  })
  output$rv_ba_max <- renderText({
    v <- safe_ba("max_hours")
    if (v == "—") return("—")
    h <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(v))
    if (is.na(h)) return("—")
    if (h < 24) sprintf("%.1f h", h) else sprintf("%.1f d", h / 24)
  })

  # Horizontal bar chart (Cleveland-style) — one bar per age bucket.
  # x axis = count of open reviews; y axis = bucket label (oldest at top).
  # Buckets: 0-1d / 1-3d / 3-7d / 7-14d / >14d
  # Colour palette from accessibility rule (4.5:1 on dark bg): #4ea8de primary blue.
  output$rv_ba_chart <- renderUI({
    raw <- roborev_backlog_age_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw))
      return(ec_empty("roborev_backlog_age.json not yet available", h = "260px"))
    buckets_raw <- raw$buckets
    if (is.null(buckets_raw) || length(buckets_raw) == 0L)
      return(ec_empty("No backlog age data available yet", h = "260px"))

    # Normalise: fromJSON(simplifyDataFrame=TRUE) returns a data.frame;
    # list-of-lists shape is also accepted.
    bdf <- if (is.data.frame(buckets_raw)) {
      buckets_raw
    } else {
      do.call(rbind, lapply(buckets_raw, function(r) {
        data.frame(label = as.character(r$label), n = as.integer(r$n),
                   stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
      }))
    }
    if (!all(c("label", "n") %in% names(bdf)) || nrow(bdf) == 0L)
      return(ec_empty("Backlog age data malformed", h = "260px"))
    bdf$n <- as.integer(bdf$n)

    # Display oldest bucket at top (reverse order for horizontal bar)
    bdf <- bdf[rev(seq_len(nrow(bdf))), ]

    n_open   <- if (!is.null(raw$n_open))   as.integer(raw$n_open)   else sum(bdf$n)
    med_h    <- if (!is.null(raw$median_hours)) as.numeric(raw$median_hours) else NA_real_
    med_str  <- if (!is.na(med_h)) {
      if (med_h < 24) sprintf("%.1f h", med_h) else sprintf("%.1f d", med_h / 24)
    } else "—"

    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(
        trigger = "axis",
        axisPointer = list(type = "shadow"),
        formatter  = DT::JS(
          "function(params) {",
          "  var d = params[0];",
          "  return d.name + '<br/>Open reviews: ' + d.value;",
          "}"
        )
      ),
      grid = list(left = 70, containLabel = FALSE),
      xAxis = list(
        type          = "value",
        name          = "Open reviews",
        nameLocation  = "middle",
        nameGap       = 28,
        axisLabel     = list(color = "#ccc"),
        nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc")
      ),
      yAxis = list(
        type      = "category",
        data      = I(bdf$label),
        axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc", fontSize = 12)
      ),
      series = list(list(
        type      = "bar",
        data      = I(bdf$n),
        itemStyle = list(color = "#4ea8de"),    # primary blue — accessibility palette
        label     = list(
          show      = TRUE,
          position  = "right",
          color     = "#ccc",
          formatter = DT::JS("function(p){ return p.value > 0 ? p.value : ''; }")
        )
      ))
    ), h = "260px",
    aria_label = paste0(
      "Horizontal bar chart: open roborev review backlog age distribution. ",
      n_open, " total open reviews. ",
      "Median age: ", med_str, ". ",
      "Buckets from youngest (0-1d) at bottom to oldest (>14d) at top. ",
      "Source: roborev_backlog_age.json from reviews.db."
    ))
  })

  # --- Review Noise Rate panel (#146 Q2) ----------------------------------------
  # Stacked bar chart: daily review outcomes in 4 segments.
  # Named PALETTE: consistent colours across chart and table (narrative-colour-persistence rule).
  NOISE_PALETTE <- c(
    "passed"          = "#69d4a0",   # green  — actionable finding
    "actioned_fail"   = "#ffd93d",   # amber  — surfaced but not resolved
    "autoclosed_fail" = "#8c8c8c",   # grey   — suppressed by threshold
    "parse_fail"      = "#f08080"    # red    — review crashed
  )

  output$rv_noise_rate_chart <- renderUI({
    raw <- roborev_noise_rate_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw) || length(raw$daily) == 0L) {
      # The file IS deployed (HTTP 200) but the daily array is empty:
      # roborev_daily_metrics in unified.duckdb hasn't been populated since
      # 2026-05-30. The previous message "not deployed" was misleading.
      gen <- if (is.list(raw) && !is.null(raw$generated_at)) raw$generated_at else "unknown"
      return(ec_empty(
        paste0("No noise-rate data yet — roborev_daily_metrics empty (last regen ", gen, ")"),
        h = "320px"))
    }

    daily_raw <- raw$daily
    # Normalise: fromJSON may return a data.frame or list-of-lists
    ddf <- if (is.data.frame(daily_raw)) {
      daily_raw
    } else {
      do.call(rbind, lapply(daily_raw, function(r) {
        data.frame(
          date            = as.character(r$date),
          passed          = as.integer(r$passed),
          actioned_fail   = as.integer(r$actioned_fail),
          autoclosed_fail = as.integer(r$autoclosed_fail),
          parse_fail      = as.integer(r$parse_fail),
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      }))
    }
    if (is.null(ddf) || nrow(ddf) == 0L || !"date" %in% names(ddf))
      return(ec_empty("Noise rate data malformed", h = "320px"))

    dates <- as.character(ddf$date)
    # Compute dataZoom start for last 90 days default
    dz_start <- 0
    d_dates <- tryCatch(as.Date(dates), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(d_dates) && !all(is.na(d_dates))) {
      total_days <- as.numeric(max(d_dates, na.rm = TRUE) - min(d_dates, na.rm = TRUE))
      if (!is.na(total_days) && total_days > 90) {
        dz_start <- round(100 * (1 - 90 / total_days))
      }
    }

    # Build 4 stacked series; each uses named NOISE_PALETTE colour
    segment_meta <- list(
      list(col = "passed",          label = "Passed",          color = NOISE_PALETTE[["passed"]]),
      list(col = "actioned_fail",   label = "Actioned-fail",   color = NOISE_PALETTE[["actioned_fail"]]),
      list(col = "autoclosed_fail", label = "Autoclosed-fail", color = NOISE_PALETTE[["autoclosed_fail"]]),
      list(col = "parse_fail",      label = "Parse-fail",      color = NOISE_PALETTE[["parse_fail"]])
    )
    series <- lapply(segment_meta, function(m) {
      vals <- if (m$col %in% names(ddf)) as.integer(ddf[[m$col]]) else rep(0L, nrow(ddf))
      list(
        name      = m$label,
        type      = "bar",
        stack     = "outcome",
        data      = I(vals),
        itemStyle = list(color = m$color)
      )
    })

    # Cumulative summary for aria label
    cum <- raw$cumulative
    noise_pct_str <- if (!is.null(cum$noise_pct)) sprintf("%.1f%%", cum$noise_pct * 100) else "—"
    total_str     <- if (!is.null(cum$total)) formatC(as.integer(cum$total), format = "d", big.mark = ",") else "—"

    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "axis", axisPointer = list(type = "shadow")),
      legend  = list(bottom = 30, textStyle = list(color = "#ccc"),
                     data = lapply(segment_meta, function(m) m$label)),
      toolbox = list(feature = list(restore = list(), saveAsImage = list())),
      dataZoom = list(
        list(type = "inside", start = dz_start, end = 100),
        list(type = "slider", start = dz_start, end = 100, bottom = 5)
      ),
      grid  = list(containLabel = TRUE, bottom = 80),
      xAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(dates),
                   axisLabel = list(rotate = 30, color = "#ccc")),
      yAxis = list(type = "value", name = "Reviews",
                   nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc"),
                   axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc")),
      series = series
    ), h = "320px",
    aria_label = paste0(
      "Stacked bar chart: daily roborev review outcomes. ",
      total_str, " total reviews. ",
      "Overall noise rate: ", noise_pct_str, ". ",
      "Segments: Passed (green), Actioned-fail (amber), Autoclosed-fail (grey), Parse-fail (red). ",
      "Source: roborev_noise_rate.json from roborev_daily_metrics in unified.duckdb."
    ))
  })

  # Compact summary table (two-column: Metric | Count + %)
  output$rv_noise_rate_table <- renderUI({
    raw <- roborev_noise_rate_raw
    cum <- if (!is.null(raw) && is.list(raw)) raw$cumulative else NULL
    if (is.null(cum)) {
      return(tags$tbody(tags$tr(tags$td(colspan = "3", "No data yet"))))
    }
    coalesce_int <- function(x) as.integer(if (is.null(x)) 0L else x)
    total <- coalesce_int(cum$total)
    n_passed      <- coalesce_int(cum$passed)
    n_actfail     <- coalesce_int(cum$actioned_fail)
    n_autocl      <- coalesce_int(cum$autoclosed_fail)
    n_parse       <- coalesce_int(cum$parse_fail)
    pct <- function(n) if (total > 0L) sprintf("%.1f%%", n / total * 100) else "—"
    tags$tbody(
      tags$tr(tags$td("Total reviews"),   tags$td(formatC(total, format = "d", big.mark = ",")), tags$td("100%")),
      tags$tr(
        tags$td(tags$span(style = paste0("color:", NOISE_PALETTE[["passed"]], ";"), "Passed")),
        tags$td(formatC(n_passed, format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(pct(n_passed))
      ),
      tags$tr(
        tags$td(tags$span(style = paste0("color:", NOISE_PALETTE[["actioned_fail"]], ";"), "Actioned-fail")),
        tags$td(formatC(n_actfail, format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(pct(n_actfail))
      ),
      tags$tr(
        tags$td(tags$span(style = paste0("color:", NOISE_PALETTE[["autoclosed_fail"]], ";"), "Autoclosed-fail")),
        tags$td(formatC(n_autocl, format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(pct(n_autocl))
      ),
      tags$tr(
        tags$td(tags$span(style = paste0("color:", NOISE_PALETTE[["parse_fail"]], ";"), "Parse-fail")),
        tags$td(formatC(n_parse, format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(pct(n_parse))
      ),
      tags$tr(
        tags$td(tags$b("Noise (total)")),
        tags$td(formatC(n_actfail + n_autocl + n_parse, format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(tags$b(if (!is.null(cum$noise_pct)) sprintf("%.1f%%", cum$noise_pct * 100) else "—"))
      )
    )
  })

  # --- Medium-Threshold Suppression panel (#146 Q7) -----------------------------
  # Horizontal Cleveland-style bar: top-5 repos by autoclosed_severity since 2026-05-21.
  # Uses NOISE_PALETTE[["autoclosed_fail"]] (grey) for consistency.
  output$rv_suppression_chart <- renderUI({
    raw <- roborev_suppression_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw) || length(raw$top_repos) == 0L)
      return(ec_empty("No suppression data yet — roborev_suppression.json not deployed", h = "260px"))

    repos_raw <- raw$top_repos
    # Normalise: fromJSON may return a data.frame or list-of-lists
    rdf <- if (is.data.frame(repos_raw)) {
      repos_raw
    } else {
      do.call(rbind, lapply(repos_raw, function(r) {
        data.frame(
          repo                = as.character(r$repo),
          autoclosed_severity = as.integer(r$autoclosed_severity),
          stringsAsFactors    = FALSE
        )
      }))
    }
    if (is.null(rdf) || nrow(rdf) == 0L)
      return(ec_empty("Suppression data malformed", h = "260px"))

    # Sort ascending so largest bar appears at top (ECharts reverses y-axis for horizontal)
    rdf <- rdf[order(rdf$autoclosed_severity), ]

    total_sup <- if (!is.null(raw$total_suppressed)) as.integer(raw$total_suppressed) else sum(rdf$autoclosed_severity)
    period    <- if (!is.null(raw$period_start)) as.character(raw$period_start) else "2026-05-21"

    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(
        trigger    = "axis",
        axisPointer = list(type = "shadow"),
        formatter  = DT::JS(
          "function(params) {",
          "  var d = params[0];",
          "  return d.name + '<br/>Suppressed: ' + d.value;",
          "}"
        )
      ),
      grid = list(left = 120, containLabel = FALSE),
      xAxis = list(
        type          = "value",
        name          = "Suppressed reviews",
        nameLocation  = "middle",
        nameGap       = 28,
        axisLabel     = list(color = "#ccc"),
        nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc")
      ),
      yAxis = list(
        type      = "category",
        data      = I(rdf$repo),
        axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc", fontSize = 12)
      ),
      series = list(list(
        type      = "bar",
        data      = I(rdf$autoclosed_severity),
        itemStyle = list(color = NOISE_PALETTE[["autoclosed_fail"]]),
        label     = list(
          show      = TRUE,
          position  = "right",
          color     = "#ccc",
          formatter = DT::JS("function(p){ return p.value > 0 ? p.value : ''; }")
        )
      ))
    ), h = "260px",
    aria_label = paste0(
      "Horizontal bar chart: top-5 repos by medium-severity autoclosed review count. ",
      "Total suppressed since ", period, ": ", total_sup, ". ",
      "Source: roborev_suppression.json from roborev_daily_metrics.reviews_autoclosed_severity."
    ))
  })

  output$rv_suppression_table <- renderUI({
    raw <- roborev_suppression_raw
    top_repos <- if (!is.null(raw) && is.list(raw)) raw$top_repos else NULL
    if (is.null(top_repos) || length(top_repos) == 0L) {
      return(tags$tbody(tags$tr(tags$td(colspan = "4", "No data yet"))))
    }
    # Normalise to data.frame
    rdf <- if (is.data.frame(top_repos)) {
      top_repos
    } else {
      do.call(rbind, lapply(top_repos, function(r) {
        data.frame(
          repo                = as.character(r$repo),
          autoclosed_severity = as.integer(r$autoclosed_severity),
          n_created           = as.integer(r$n_created),
          suppress_pct        = as.numeric(r$suppress_pct),
          stringsAsFactors    = FALSE
        )
      }))
    }
    rdf <- rdf[order(-rdf$autoclosed_severity), ]
    rows <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(rdf)), function(i) {
      r <- rdf[i, , drop = FALSE]
      tags$tr(
        tags$td(r$repo),
        tags$td(formatC(as.integer(r$autoclosed_severity), format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(formatC(as.integer(r$n_created),           format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(sprintf("%.1f%%", as.numeric(r$suppress_pct) * 100))
      )
    })
    tags$tbody(rows)
  })

  # --- Cost ROI panels: Q1, Q11, Q20 (#146) ------------------------------------
  # Named palette: same colour per agent across all three panels.
  # Accessibility: all colours meet 4.5:1 contrast on dark bg (per accessibility rule).
  AGENT_PALETTE <- c(
    "codex"       = "#4ea8de",   # primary blue
    "claude-code" = "#69d4a0",   # success green
    "gemini"      = "#ffd93d"    # warm yellow
  )
  agent_colour <- function(agent_name) {
    col <- AGENT_PALETTE[agent_name]
    if (is.na(col)) "#c084fc" else col   # purple fallback for unknown agents
  }

  # Helper: parse cost per finding series (list-of-lists or data frame)
  safe_cpf_series <- function(raw) {
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw)) return(NULL)
    s <- raw$series
    if (is.null(s) || length(s) == 0L) return(NULL)
    if (is.data.frame(s)) {
      if (nrow(s) == 0L) return(NULL)
      s
    } else {
      tryCatch(
        do.call(rbind, lapply(s, function(r) {
          data.frame(
            agent           = as.character(r$agent),
            date            = as.character(r$date),
            pass_count      = as.integer(r$pass_count),
            addressed_count = as.integer(r$addressed_count),
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        })),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
    }
  }

  safe_cpf_summary <- function(raw) {
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw)) return(NULL)
    s <- raw$summary
    if (is.null(s) || length(s) == 0L) return(NULL)
    if (is.data.frame(s)) {
      if (nrow(s) == 0L) return(NULL)
      s
    } else {
      tryCatch(
        do.call(rbind, lapply(s, function(r) {
          data.frame(
            agent           = as.character(r$agent),
            total_pass      = as.integer(r$total_pass),
            total_addressed = as.integer(r$total_addressed),
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        })),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
    }
  }

  # Q1: cost per finding — line chart over time, per-agent, showing addressed counts
  output$rv_cpf_chart <- renderUI({
    s <- safe_cpf_series(roborev_cpf_raw)
    if (is.null(s))
      return(ec_empty(
        "No cost-per-finding data yet — roborev_cost_per_finding.json not deployed",
        h = "300px"))

    dates   <- sort(unique(s$date))
    agents  <- sort(unique(s$agent))

    series_list <- lapply(agents, function(ag) {
      ag_df  <- s[s$agent == ag, ]
      ag_df  <- ag_df[order(ag_df$date), ]
      # Reindex to all dates (fill 0 for missing dates)
      counts <- setNames(ag_df$addressed_count, ag_df$date)
      vals   <- as.integer(counts[dates])
      vals[is.na(vals)] <- 0L
      list(
        name      = ag,
        type      = "line",
        data      = I(vals),
        smooth    = TRUE,
        itemStyle = list(color = agent_colour(ag))
      )
    })

    n_total <- sum(s$addressed_count, na.rm = TRUE)
    ec_line(
      dates   = dates,
      series  = series_list,
      h       = "300px",
      y_name  = "Addressed findings",
      aria_label = paste0(
        "Line chart: addressed roborev findings per agent over time. ",
        length(agents), " agents: ", paste(agents, collapse = ", "), ". ",
        "Total addressed: ", n_total, ". ",
        "Addressed = close_reason='manual' in roborev_review_lifecycle. ",
        "Cost per finding not yet available — total_cost_usd not instrumented. ",
        "Source: roborev_cost_per_finding.json."
      )
    )
  })

  output$rv_cpf_table <- renderUI({
    sm <- safe_cpf_summary(roborev_cpf_raw)
    if (is.null(sm)) {
      return(tags$tbody(tags$tr(tags$td(colspan = "4", "No data yet"))))
    }
    sm <- sm[order(sm$total_addressed, decreasing = TRUE), ]
    rows <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(sm)), function(i) {
      r <- sm[i, , drop = FALSE]
      # The upstream JSON has cost_usd_per_finding as an empty object {}
      # (not yet instrumented). When jsonlite parses {} into a single-row
      # data.frame slice, r$cost_usd_per_finding is an empty list(); then
      # is.na(list()) returns logical(0), and `if (logical(0))` throws
      # "missing value where TRUE/FALSE needed". Tighten the guard to
      # accept only a scalar numeric.
      cost_val <- r$cost_usd_per_finding
      cost_str <- if (is.numeric(cost_val) && length(cost_val) == 1L && !is.na(cost_val)) {
        sprintf("$%.4f", cost_val)
      } else "— (not instrumented)"
      tags$tr(
        style = paste0("color:", agent_colour(r$agent), ";"),
        tags$td(r$agent),
        tags$td(formatC(r$total_addressed, format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(formatC(r$total_pass,      format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(cost_str)
      )
    })
    tags$tbody(rows)
  })

  # Q11: cheapest agent per resolved finding — Cleveland dot chart
  output$rv_cpa_chart <- renderUI({
    raw <- roborev_cpa_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw)) {
      return(ec_empty(
        "No cost-per-agent data yet — roborev_cost_per_agent.json not deployed",
        h = "250px"))
    }
    agents_raw <- raw$agents
    if (is.null(agents_raw) || length(agents_raw) == 0L) {
      return(ec_empty("No agent data available yet", h = "250px"))
    }
    cpa_df <- if (is.data.frame(agents_raw)) {
      agents_raw
    } else {
      tryCatch(
        do.call(rbind, lapply(agents_raw, function(r) {
          data.frame(
            agent           = as.character(r$agent),
            total_addressed = as.integer(r$total_addressed),
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        })),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
    }
    if (is.null(cpa_df) || nrow(cpa_df) == 0L)
      return(ec_empty("Agent data could not be parsed", h = "250px"))

    # Sort ascending for Cleveland dot (lowest count at bottom = best per-dollar)
    cpa_df <- cpa_df[order(cpa_df$total_addressed, decreasing = FALSE), ]

    colours <- vapply(cpa_df$agent, agent_colour, character(1))
    best_agent <- cpa_df$agent[which.max(cpa_df$total_addressed)]
    best_n     <- max(cpa_df$total_addressed)

    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(
        trigger = "axis",
        axisPointer = list(type = "shadow"),
        formatter  = DT::JS(
          "function(params) {",
          "  var d = params[0];",
          "  return d.name + '<br/>Addressed: ' + d.value;",
          "}"
        )
      ),
      grid = list(left = 120, containLabel = FALSE),
      xAxis = list(
        type          = "value",
        name          = "Addressed findings",
        nameLocation  = "middle",
        nameGap       = 28,
        axisLabel     = list(color = "#ccc"),
        nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc")
      ),
      yAxis = list(
        type      = "category",
        data      = I(cpa_df$agent),
        axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc", fontSize = 12)
      ),
      series = list(list(
        type       = "scatter",
        data       = I(cpa_df$total_addressed),
        symbolSize = 14,
        itemStyle  = list(
          color = DT::JS(paste0(
            "function(params) {",
            "var m = ", toJSON(setNames(as.list(colours), cpa_df$agent), auto_unbox = TRUE), ";",
            "return m[params.name] || '#c084fc';",
            "}"
          ))
        )
      ))
    ), h = "250px",
    aria_label = paste0(
      "Cleveland dot chart: addressed finding count per roborev review agent. ",
      "Most addressed: ", best_agent, " with ", best_n, " findings. ",
      "When cost instrumentation lands, x-axis will show USD per finding. ",
      "Source: roborev_cost_per_agent.json."
    ))
  })

  # Q18: session duration vs roborev findings — scatter chart + bucket summary
  # Helper: coerce roborev_session_findings.json (array-of-objects OR data frame)
  safe_sf_df <- function(raw) {
    if (is.null(raw)) return(NULL)
    if (is.data.frame(raw)) {
      if (nrow(raw) == 0L) return(NULL)
      return(raw)
    }
    if (!is.list(raw) || length(raw) == 0L) return(NULL)
    tryCatch(
      do.call(rbind, lapply(raw, function(r) {
        data.frame(
          session_id   = as.character(r$session_id),
          duration_hours = as.numeric(r$duration_hours),
          n_findings   = as.integer(r$n_findings),
          agent        = if (is.null(r$agent) || is.na(r$agent)) "unknown"
                         else as.character(r$agent),
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      })),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
  }

  output$rv_q18_chart <- renderUI({
    sf <- safe_sf_df(roborev_sf_raw)
    if (is.null(sf))
      return(ec_empty(
        "No session-findings data yet — roborev_session_findings.json not deployed",
        h = "320px"))

    colours <- vapply(sf$agent, agent_colour, character(1))
    n_sessions <- nrow(sf)
    max_findings <- max(sf$n_findings, na.rm = TRUE)
    max_dur      <- max(sf$duration_hours, na.rm = TRUE)

    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(
        trigger = "item",
        formatter = DT::JS(
          "function(params) {",
          "  var d = params.data;",
          "  return 'Agent: ' + params.seriesName",
          "    + '<br/>Duration: ' + d[0].toFixed(1) + ' h'",
          "    + '<br/>Findings: ' + d[1];",
          "}"
        )
      ),
      legend = list(
        data = I(sort(unique(sf$agent))),
        textStyle = list(color = "#ccc"),
        bottom = 0
      ),
      grid = list(top = 40, bottom = 60, left = 60, right = 20,
                  containLabel = TRUE),
      xAxis = list(
        type          = "value",
        name          = "Session duration (h)",
        nameLocation  = "middle",
        nameGap       = 30,
        axisLabel     = list(color = "#ccc"),
        nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc")
      ),
      yAxis = list(
        type          = "value",
        name          = "Roborev findings",
        nameLocation  = "middle",
        nameGap       = 40,
        axisLabel     = list(color = "#ccc"),
        nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc")
      ),
      series = lapply(sort(unique(sf$agent)), function(ag) {
        ag_df <- sf[sf$agent == ag, , drop = FALSE]
        list(
          name = ag,
          type = "scatter",
          symbolSize = 10,
          itemStyle  = list(color = agent_colour(ag), opacity = 0.8),
          data = I(lapply(seq_len(nrow(ag_df)), function(i)
            list(ag_df$duration_hours[i], ag_df$n_findings[i])
          ))
        )
      })
    ), h = "320px",
    aria_label = paste0(
      "Scatter chart: session duration (x, hours) vs roborev findings count (y) per session. ",
      n_sessions, " sessions plotted. ",
      "Max findings in one session: ", max_findings, ". ",
      "Max session duration: ", round(max_dur, 1), " h. ",
      "Colour encodes driving agent (AGENT_PALETTE). ",
      "Source: roborev_session_findings.json from #255 rollup."
    ))
  })

  output$rv_q18_table <- renderUI({
    sf <- safe_sf_df(roborev_sf_raw)
    if (is.null(sf))
      return(tags$tbody(tags$tr(tags$td(colspan = "3", "No data yet"))))

    # Duration buckets: <1h, 1-3h, 3-8h, >8h
    bucket_label <- function(h) {
      dplyr::case_when(
        h <  1 ~ "<1 h",
        h <  3 ~ "1–3 h",
        h <  8 ~ "3–8 h",
        TRUE   ~ ">8 h"
      )
    }
    bucket_order <- c("<1 h", "1–3 h", "3–8 h", ">8 h")

    sf$bucket <- bucket_label(sf$duration_hours)
    buckets_df <- sf |>
      dplyr::group_by(bucket) |>
      dplyr::summarise(
        n_sessions      = dplyr::n(),
        median_findings = median(n_findings, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) |>
      dplyr::mutate(bucket = factor(bucket, levels = bucket_order)) |>
      dplyr::arrange(bucket)

    rows <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(buckets_df)), function(i) {
      r <- buckets_df[i, , drop = FALSE]
      tags$tr(
        tags$td(as.character(r$bucket)),
        tags$td(formatC(r$n_sessions,      format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(round(r$median_findings, 1))
      )
    })
    tags$tbody(rows)
  })

  # Q20: session cost vs review cost — stacked area chart over time
  safe_vsr_daily <- function(raw) {
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw)) return(NULL)
    d <- raw$daily
    if (is.null(d) || length(d) == 0L) return(NULL)
    if (is.data.frame(d)) {
      if (nrow(d) == 0L) return(NULL)
      d
    } else {
      tryCatch(
        do.call(rbind, lapply(d, function(r) {
          data.frame(
            date             = as.character(r$date),
            session_cost_usd = as.numeric(r$session_cost_usd),
            review_cost_usd  = as.numeric(r$review_cost_usd),
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        })),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
    }
  }

  output$rv_vsr_chart <- renderUI({
    d <- safe_vsr_daily(roborev_vsr_raw)
    if (is.null(d))
      return(ec_empty(
        "No session vs review cost data yet — roborev_vs_session_cost.json not deployed",
        h = "320px"))

    d <- d[order(d$date), ]

    series_list <- list(
      list(
        name      = "Session cost (USD)",
        type      = "line",
        stack     = "cost",
        areaStyle = list(opacity = 0.6),
        data      = I(round(d$session_cost_usd, 4)),
        itemStyle = list(color = "#4ea8de")   # primary blue (session)
      ),
      list(
        name      = "Review cost (USD)",
        type      = "line",
        stack     = "cost",
        areaStyle = list(opacity = 0.6),
        data      = I(round(d$review_cost_usd, 4)),
        itemStyle = list(color = "#69d4a0")   # success green (review)
      )
    )

    overall <- if (!is.null(roborev_vsr_raw$overall)) roborev_vsr_raw$overall else NULL
    total_s  <- if (!is.null(overall$session_total)) round(overall$session_total, 2) else sum(d$session_cost_usd, na.rm=TRUE)
    review_p <- if (!is.null(overall$review_pct)) overall$review_pct else 0

    ec_line(
      dates   = d$date,
      series  = series_list,
      h       = "320px",
      y_name  = "USD",
      aria_label = paste0(
        "Stacked area chart: daily session cost (blue) vs roborev review cost (green). ",
        "Total session cost: $", sprintf("%.2f", total_s), ". ",
        "Review overhead: ", review_p, "% of session cost. ",
        "Review costs are not yet instrumented (all zero as of 2026-05-30). ",
        "Healthy target: review overhead <10-20% of session cost. ",
        "Source: roborev_vs_session_cost.json."
      )
    )
  })

  output$rv_vsr_session_total <- renderText({
    if (is.null(roborev_vsr_raw) || !is.list(roborev_vsr_raw)) return("—")
    ov <- roborev_vsr_raw$overall
    if (is.null(ov) || is.null(ov$session_total)) return("—")
    sprintf("$%s", formatC(round(ov$session_total, 2), format = "f", digits = 2,
                           big.mark = ","))
  })

  output$rv_vsr_review_total <- renderText({
    if (is.null(roborev_vsr_raw) || !is.list(roborev_vsr_raw)) return("—")
    ov <- roborev_vsr_raw$overall
    if (is.null(ov) || is.null(ov$review_total)) return("—")
    v <- round(ov$review_total, 4)
    if (v == 0) "— (not instrumented)" else sprintf("$%.4f", v)
  })

  output$rv_vsr_pct <- renderText({
    if (is.null(roborev_vsr_raw) || !is.list(roborev_vsr_raw)) return("—")
    ov <- roborev_vsr_raw$overall
    if (is.null(ov) || is.null(ov$review_pct)) return("—")
    v <- ov$review_pct
    if (v == 0) "— (not instrumented)" else sprintf("%.2f%%", v)
  })

  # --- Q16: Top commits by finding count (#146) ---------------------------------
  # Reads roborev_commit_findings.json. Degrades gracefully when absent.
  # Commit SHA (7-char) is HTML-linked to the GitHub commit URL.
  safe_cf <- function(raw) {
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw)) return(NULL)
    d <- raw$commits
    if (is.null(d) || length(d) == 0L) return(NULL)
    if (is.data.frame(d)) {
      if (nrow(d) == 0L) return(NULL)
      d
    } else {
      tryCatch(
        do.call(rbind, lapply(d, function(r) {
          data.frame(
            commit_sha_short = as.character(r$commit_sha_short),
            commit_sha_full  = as.character(r$commit_sha_full),
            repo             = as.character(r$repo),
            commit_msg       = as.character(r$commit_msg),
            n_findings       = as.integer(r$n_findings),
            last_reviewed    = as.character(r$last_reviewed),
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        })),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
    }
  }

  output$rv_commit_findings_table <- renderUI({
    d <- safe_cf(roborev_commit_findings_raw)
    if (is.null(d)) {
      return(tags$div(class = "p-3 text-muted",
        "No commit-findings data yet — roborev_commit_findings.json not deployed."))
    }
    # Sort desc by finding count (should already be sorted, but be defensive)
    d <- d[order(d$n_findings, decreasing = TRUE), ]
    d <- head(d, 10L)

    rows <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(d)), function(i) {
      r <- d[i, , drop = FALSE]
      # Build GitHub commit URL from repo name + full SHA
      # Pattern: https://github.com/JohnGavin/<repo>/commit/<sha>
      sha_link <- if (nzchar(r$commit_sha_full) && !is.na(r$commit_sha_full) &&
                      nzchar(r$repo) && !is.na(r$repo)) {
        tags$a(
          href   = paste0("https://github.com/JohnGavin/", r$repo,
                          "/commit/", r$commit_sha_full),
          target = "_blank",
          rel    = "noopener",
          style  = "color:#7cb5ec; font-family:monospace;",
          r$commit_sha_short
        )
      } else {
        tags$code(r$commit_sha_short)
      }
      # Truncate commit message to 60 chars
      msg_short <- if (!is.na(r$commit_msg) && nzchar(r$commit_msg)) {
        if (nchar(r$commit_msg) > 60L) paste0(substr(r$commit_msg, 1L, 57L), "...") else r$commit_msg
      } else "—"
      tags$tr(
        tags$td(sha_link),
        tags$td(msg_short),
        tags$td(r$repo),
        tags$td(style = "text-align:right; font-weight:bold;", r$n_findings),
        tags$td(substr(r$last_reviewed, 1L, 10L))
      )
    })

    tagList(
      tags$table(class = "table table-sm table-dark mb-0",
        tags$thead(tags$tr(
          tags$th("Commit"), tags$th("Message"), tags$th("Repo"),
          tags$th("Findings"), tags$th("Last reviewed")
        )),
        tags$tbody(rows)
      )
    )
  })

  # --- Q19: Per-agent noise rate (#146) -----------------------------------------
  # Reads roborev_session_agent_noise.json.
  # Bar chart: noise rate per agent (AGENT_PALETTE colours — see Q1/Q11 above).
  # Summary table: agent, n_reviews, n_addressed, noise_rate.
  safe_san <- function(raw) {
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw)) return(NULL)
    d <- raw$agents
    if (is.null(d) || length(d) == 0L) return(NULL)
    if (is.data.frame(d)) {
      if (nrow(d) == 0L) return(NULL)
      d
    } else {
      tryCatch(
        do.call(rbind, lapply(d, function(r) {
          data.frame(
            agent       = as.character(r$agent),
            n_reviews   = as.integer(r$n_reviews),
            n_addressed = as.integer(r$n_addressed),
            n_passed    = as.integer(r$n_passed),
            noise_rate  = as.numeric(r$noise_rate),
            pass_rate   = as.numeric(r$pass_rate),
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        })),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
    }
  }

  output$rv_agent_noise_chart <- renderUI({
    d <- safe_san(roborev_san_raw)
    if (is.null(d))
      return(ec_empty(
        "No per-agent noise data yet — roborev_session_agent_noise.json not deployed",
        h = "280px"))

    # Sort by noise_rate ascending (highest noise at top in horizontal chart = most problematic)
    d <- d[order(d$noise_rate, decreasing = FALSE), ]

    colours <- vapply(d$agent, agent_colour, character(1))
    noise_pct <- round(d$noise_rate * 100, 1)

    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(
        trigger = "axis",
        axisPointer = list(type = "shadow"),
        formatter = DT::JS(
          "function(params) {",
          "  var d = params[0];",
          "  return d.name + '<br/>Noise rate: ' + d.value.toFixed(1) + '%';",
          "}"
        )
      ),
      grid = list(left = 120, containLabel = FALSE),
      xAxis = list(
        type          = "value",
        name          = "Noise rate (%)",
        nameLocation  = "middle",
        nameGap       = 28,
        max           = 100,
        axisLabel     = list(color = "#ccc", formatter = "{value}%"),
        nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc")
      ),
      yAxis = list(
        type      = "category",
        data      = I(d$agent),
        axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc", fontSize = 12)
      ),
      series = list(list(
        type       = "bar",
        data       = I(noise_pct),
        itemStyle  = list(
          color = DT::JS(paste0(
            "function(params) {",
            "var m = ", toJSON(setNames(as.list(colours), d$agent), auto_unbox = TRUE), ";",
            "return m[params.name] || '#c084fc';",
            "}"
          ))
        )
      ))
    ), h = "280px",
    aria_label = paste0(
      "Horizontal bar chart: per-agent review noise rate (percent of reviews with no actionable finding). ",
      paste(d$agent, collapse = ", "), ". ",
      "Lower noise rate = more reliable signal from that agent. ",
      "Source: roborev_session_agent_noise.json."
    ))
  })

  output$rv_agent_noise_table <- renderUI({
    d <- safe_san(roborev_san_raw)
    if (is.null(d)) {
      return(tags$tbody(tags$tr(tags$td(colspan = "5", "No data yet"))))
    }
    d <- d[order(d$noise_rate, decreasing = TRUE), ]
    rows <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(d)), function(i) {
      r <- d[i, , drop = FALSE]
      tags$tr(
        style = paste0("color:", agent_colour(r$agent), ";"),
        tags$td(r$agent),
        tags$td(formatC(r$n_reviews,   format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(formatC(r$n_addressed, format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(formatC(r$n_passed,    format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(sprintf("%.1f%%", r$noise_rate * 100))
      )
    })
    tags$tbody(rows)
  })

  # --- Top Files by Finding Frequency (#146 Q17) --------------------------------
  # Compact table: File | Count | Repos | Last seen | H | M | L
  # Source: roborev_location_findings.json — {files:[...], n_reviews, generated_at}
  output$rv_location_table <- renderUI({
    raw <- roborev_rlf_raw
    files <- if (!is.null(raw) && is.list(raw)) {
      if (is.data.frame(raw$files)) {
        raw$files
      } else if (is.list(raw$files) && length(raw$files) > 0L) {
        tryCatch(
          do.call(rbind, lapply(raw$files, function(r) {
            data.frame(
              file_path      = as.character(r$file_path),
              occurrences    = as.integer(r$occurrences),
              distinct_repos = as.integer(r$distinct_repos),
              last_seen      = as.character(r$last_seen),
              n_high         = as.integer(r$n_high),
              n_medium       = as.integer(r$n_medium),
              n_low          = as.integer(r$n_low),
              stringsAsFactors = FALSE
            )
          })),
          error = function(e) NULL
        )
      } else {
        NULL
      }
    } else {
      NULL
    }

    if (is.null(files) || nrow(files) == 0L) {
      return(tags$tbody(
        tags$tr(tags$td(colspan = "7", style = "color:#aaa; text-align:center;",
          "No location data yet — run export_dashboard_data.R locally to populate roborev_location_findings.json"))
      ))
    }

    # Top-15 (already sorted by export, but re-sort defensively)
    files <- files[order(-files$occurrences, files$file_path), ]
    top_n <- min(15L, nrow(files))
    files <- files[seq_len(top_n), , drop = FALSE]

    rows <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(files)), function(i) {
      f <- files[i, ]
      # Truncate long file paths at 50 chars with trailing ellipsis
      fp_display <- if (nchar(f$file_path) > 50L) {
        paste0("...", substr(f$file_path, nchar(f$file_path) - 46L, nchar(f$file_path)))
      } else {
        f$file_path
      }
      tags$tr(
        tags$td(style = "font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.85em;",
                title = f$file_path, fp_display),
        tags$td(style = "text-align: right;",
                formatC(f$occurrences, format = "d", big.mark = ",")),
        tags$td(style = "text-align: right;", f$distinct_repos),
        tags$td(substr(as.character(f$last_seen), 1L, 10L)),
        tags$td(style = "text-align: right; color: #f08080;", f$n_high),
        tags$td(style = "text-align: right; color: #ffd93d;", f$n_medium),
        tags$td(style = "text-align: right; color: #69d4a0;", f$n_low)
      )
    })
    tags$tbody(rows)
  })

  # --- Q4: Time-to-Fix After a Real Finding (#273) --------------------------------
  # KPI text: n_fix_linked (for UI prose)
  output$rv_q4_n_fix <- renderText({
    raw <- roborev_rft_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw)) return("0")
    v <- raw$n_fix_linked
    if (is.null(v) || is.na(v)) return("0")
    as.character(as.integer(v))
  })

  # Bar chart: count per time-to-close bucket (0–2h, 2–4h, 4–8h, 8–16h, 16+h)
  output$rv_q4_chart <- renderUI({
    raw <- roborev_rft_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw) || is.null(raw$rows) || length(raw$rows) == 0L)
      return(ec_empty("No fix-timing data yet — run export_dashboard_data.R to populate roborev_fix_timing.json", h = "260px"))

    # Parse rows
    rows_df <- if (is.data.frame(raw$rows)) {
      raw$rows
    } else {
      tryCatch(
        do.call(rbind, lapply(raw$rows, function(r) {
          data.frame(
            fix_method         = as.character(r$fix_method),
            hours_fix_to_close = as.numeric(r$hours_fix_to_close),
            stringsAsFactors   = FALSE
          )
        })),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
    }
    if (is.null(rows_df) || nrow(rows_df) == 0L)
      return(ec_empty("No fix-timing rows available", h = "260px"))

    # Build time buckets
    bucket_labels <- c("0–2 h", "2–4 h", "4–8 h", "8–16 h", "16+ h")
    bucket_breaks <- c(-Inf, 2, 4, 8, 16, Inf)
    rows_df$bucket <- cut(
      rows_df$hours_fix_to_close,
      breaks = bucket_breaks,
      labels = bucket_labels,
      right  = FALSE
    )
    bdf <- as.data.frame(table(bucket = rows_df$bucket))
    names(bdf) <- c("label", "n")
    bdf$n <- as.integer(bdf$n)

    n_total <- as.integer(if (!is.null(raw$n_fix_linked)) raw$n_fix_linked else sum(bdf$n))
    n_manual <- as.integer(if (!is.null(raw$n_manual)) raw$n_manual else 0L)
    n_cr     <- as.integer(if (!is.null(raw$n_commit_ref)) raw$n_commit_ref else 0L)

    cap_txt <- paste0(
      "Time from fix commit to review closure. n=", n_total,
      " reviews with explicit fix link (manual=", n_manual,
      " + commit_reference=", n_cr,
      "). Will grow as the roborev #N commit-message convention is adopted (llm#359).",
      " Source: unified.duckdb roborev_review_lifecycle."
    )

    ec(list(
      title   = list(text = cap_txt,
                     top = "bottom", left = "center",
                     textStyle = list(color = "#aaa", fontSize = 10, fontWeight = "normal",
                                      overflow = "breakAll", width = 600)),
      tooltip = list(trigger = "axis", axisPointer = list(type = "shadow")),
      grid    = list(left = 70, right = 20, bottom = 90, containLabel = FALSE),
      xAxis   = list(type = "value", name = "Reviews",
                     nameLocation = "middle", nameGap = 28,
                     axisLabel     = list(color = "#ccc"),
                     nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc")),
      yAxis   = list(type = "category", data = I(bucket_labels),
                     axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc", fontSize = 12)),
      series  = list(list(
        type      = "bar",
        data      = I(bdf$n),
        itemStyle = list(color = "#4ea8de"),
        label     = list(show = TRUE, position = "right",
                         color = "#ccc", fontSize = 11)
      ))
    ), h = "320px",
    aria_label = paste0(
      "Horizontal bar chart: count of fix-linked reviews per time-to-close bucket. ",
      "n=", n_total, " total. Most closures are within 4 hours for manual reviews."
    ))
  })

  # --- Q9: Closure Breakdown — False-Positive Rate (#273) -------------------------
  # KPI text outputs for UI prose
  output$rv_q9_n_closed <- renderText({
    raw <- roborev_rcb_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw)) return("0")
    v <- raw$n_closed
    if (is.null(v) || is.na(v)) return("0")
    formatC(as.integer(v), format = "d", big.mark = ",")
  })
  output$rv_q9_fix_linked_pct <- renderText({
    raw <- roborev_rcb_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw)) return("0")
    v <- raw$fix_linked_pct
    if (is.null(v) || is.na(v)) return("0")
    as.character(round(as.numeric(v), 1))
  })
  output$rv_q9_autoclose_pct <- renderText({
    raw <- roborev_rcb_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw)) return("0")
    v <- raw$autoclose_pct
    if (is.null(v) || is.na(v)) return("0")
    as.character(round(as.numeric(v), 1))
  })
  output$rv_q9_n_unknown <- renderText({
    raw <- roborev_rcb_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw)) return("0")
    v <- raw$n_unknown
    if (is.null(v) || is.na(v)) return("0")
    formatC(as.integer(v), format = "d", big.mark = ",")
  })
  output$rv_q9_unknown_pct <- renderText({
    raw <- roborev_rcb_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw)) return("0")
    v <- raw$unknown_pct
    if (is.null(v) || is.na(v)) return("0")
    as.character(round(as.numeric(v), 1))
  })

  output$rv_q9_chart <- renderUI({
    raw <- roborev_rcb_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw) || is.null(raw$buckets) || length(raw$buckets) == 0L)
      return(ec_empty("No closure breakdown data yet — run export_dashboard_data.R to populate roborev_closure_breakdown.json", h = "200px"))

    # Parse buckets
    bkts <- if (is.data.frame(raw$buckets)) {
      raw$buckets
    } else {
      tryCatch(
        do.call(rbind, lapply(raw$buckets, function(b) {
          data.frame(
            bucket = as.character(b$bucket),
            label  = as.character(b$label),
            n      = as.integer(b$n),
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        })),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
    }
    if (is.null(bkts) || nrow(bkts) == 0L)
      return(ec_empty("Closure breakdown data malformed", h = "200px"))

    n_closed    <- as.integer(if (!is.null(raw$n_closed))   raw$n_closed   else sum(bkts$n))
    n_fix       <- as.integer(if (!is.null(raw$n_fix_linked)) raw$n_fix_linked else 0L)
    n_auto      <- as.integer(if (!is.null(raw$n_autoclose)) raw$n_autoclose else 0L)
    n_unk       <- as.integer(if (!is.null(raw$n_unknown))   raw$n_unknown  else 0L)

    fix_pct  <- if (n_closed > 0L) round(100 * n_fix  / n_closed, 1) else 0
    auto_pct <- if (n_closed > 0L) round(100 * n_auto / n_closed, 1) else 0
    unk_pct  <- if (n_closed > 0L) round(100 * n_unk  / n_closed, 1) else 0

    # Single stacked horizontal bar: one bar at y = "Closed reviews"
    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(trigger = "axis", axisPointer = list(type = "shadow")),
      legend  = list(
        data   = I(c("Fix-linked", "Autoclosed", "Unknown")),
        bottom = 0,
        textStyle = list(color = "#ccc")
      ),
      grid = list(left = 140, right = 20, bottom = 60, containLabel = FALSE),
      xAxis = list(type = "value", name = paste0("Reviews (total closed: ", formatC(n_closed, format = "d", big.mark = ","), ")"),
                   nameLocation = "middle", nameGap = 32,
                   axisLabel     = list(color = "#ccc"),
                   nameTextStyle = list(color = "#ccc")),
      yAxis = list(type = "category", data = I(c("Closed reviews")),
                   axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc", fontSize = 12)),
      series = list(
        list(name = "Fix-linked",
             type = "bar", stack = "total",
             data = I(list(n_fix)),
             itemStyle = list(color = "#69d4a0"),
             label = list(show = TRUE, formatter = paste0(fix_pct, "%"),
                          color = "#000", fontSize = 11)),
        list(name = "Autoclosed",
             type = "bar", stack = "total",
             data = I(list(n_auto)),
             itemStyle = list(color = "#ffd93d"),
             label = list(show = TRUE, formatter = paste0(auto_pct, "%"),
                          color = "#000", fontSize = 11)),
        list(name = "Unknown",
             type = "bar", stack = "total",
             data = I(list(n_unk)),
             itemStyle = list(color = "#f08080"),
             label = list(show = TRUE, formatter = paste0(unk_pct, "%"),
                          color = "#000", fontSize = 11))
      )
    ), h = "200px",
    aria_label = paste0(
      "Stacked horizontal bar: ", formatC(n_closed, format="d", big.mark=","),
      " closed reviews split into fix-linked (", fix_pct, "%, n=", n_fix,
      "), autoclosed (", auto_pct, "%, n=", n_auto,
      "), and unknown (", unk_pct, "%, n=", n_unk, ")."
    ))
  })

  # --- Q14: Closing-the-Loop Funnel (#273) -----------------------------------------
  # KPI text for UI prose
  output$rv_q14_fix_any <- renderText({
    raw <- roborev_rlf2_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw)) return("0")
    v <- raw$n_fix_any
    if (is.null(v) || is.na(v)) return("0")
    as.character(as.integer(v))
  })
  output$rv_q14_commit_ref <- renderText({
    raw <- roborev_rlf2_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw)) return("0")
    v <- raw$n_commit_ref
    if (is.null(v) || is.na(v)) return("0")
    as.character(as.integer(v))
  })

  output$rv_q14_chart <- renderUI({
    raw <- roborev_rlf2_raw
    if (is.null(raw) || !is.list(raw) || is.null(raw$steps) || length(raw$steps) == 0L)
      return(ec_empty("No funnel data yet — run export_dashboard_data.R to populate roborev_loop_funnel.json", h = "280px"))

    # Parse steps
    sdf <- if (is.data.frame(raw$steps)) {
      raw$steps
    } else {
      tryCatch(
        do.call(rbind, lapply(raw$steps, function(s) {
          data.frame(
            step  = as.integer(s$step),
            label = as.character(s$label),
            n     = as.integer(s$n),
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        })),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
    }
    if (is.null(sdf) || nrow(sdf) == 0L)
      return(ec_empty("Funnel data malformed", h = "280px"))

    sdf <- sdf[order(sdf$step), ]
    n_total <- as.integer(if (!is.null(raw$n_total)) raw$n_total else sdf$n[1])
    n_fix   <- as.integer(if (!is.null(raw$n_fix_any))    raw$n_fix_any    else 0L)
    n_cr    <- as.integer(if (!is.null(raw$n_commit_ref)) raw$n_commit_ref else 0L)

    # Colour: step 1+2 = neutral blue; step 3+4 = green (goal states)
    bar_colours <- c("#4ea8de", "#5edaff", "#69d4a0", "#98d8c8")

    series_data <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(sdf)), function(i) {
      list(
        value     = sdf$n[i],
        itemStyle = list(color = bar_colours[min(i, length(bar_colours))])
      )
    })

    ec(list(
      tooltip = list(
        trigger = "axis",
        axisPointer = list(type = "shadow"),
        formatter = DT::JS(
          "function(params) {",
          "  var d = params[0];",
          "  return d.name + '<br/>' + d.value.toLocaleString() + ' reviews';",
          "}"
        )
      ),
      grid = list(left = 20, right = 20, bottom = 20, top = 20, containLabel = TRUE),
      xAxis = list(type = "value", show = FALSE),
      yAxis = list(
        type      = "category",
        data      = I(rev(sdf$label)),
        axisLabel = list(color = "#ccc", fontSize = 11,
                         overflow = "breakAll", width = 400)
      ),
      series = list(list(
        type      = "bar",
        data      = I(rev(series_data)),
        label     = list(show = TRUE, position = "right",
                         color = "#ccc", fontSize = 11,
                         formatter = DT::JS("function(p){return p.value.toLocaleString();}")),
        barMaxWidth = 40
      ))
    ), h = "300px",
    aria_label = paste0(
      "Horizontal bar chart showing 4 funnel steps: ",
      formatC(n_total, format="d", big.mark=","), " reviews created; ",
      formatC(as.integer(if (!is.null(raw$n_closed)) raw$n_closed else 0L), format="d", big.mark=","), " closed; ",
      n_fix, " closed with explicit fix link; ",
      n_cr, " closed via commit-reference convention."
    ))
  })

  # --- Config Health tab -------------------------------------------------------
  cfg_filtered <- reactive({
    if (!has_rows(config_staleness_df)) return(data.frame())
    d <- config_staleness_df
    if (!is.null(input$cfg_type_filter) && nzchar(input$cfg_type_filter) &&
        input$cfg_type_filter != "all")
      d <- d[d$item_type == input$cfg_type_filter, , drop = FALSE]
    d
  })

  output$cfg_staleness_summary <- renderUI({
    d <- cfg_filtered()
    if (!has_rows(d))
      return(tags$p(class = "text-muted p-2 small",
        "No config health data — run: Rscript ~/.claude/scripts/skill_usage_etl.R --apply"))
    counts <- sort(table(d$staleness_status), decreasing = TRUE)
    tags$div(class = "p-2",
      tags$table(
        style = "width: auto; border-collapse: collapse; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;",
        tags$thead(
          tags$tr(lapply(names(counts), function(nm)
            tags$th(style = "padding: 2px 10px; text-align: right; font-size: 13px;",
              nm)))
        ),
        tags$tbody(
          tags$tr(lapply(as.integer(counts), function(n)
            tags$td(style = "padding: 2px 10px; text-align: right; font-size: 13px;",
              n)))
        )
      )
    )
  })

  output$cfg_staleness_table <- DT::renderDT({
    d <- cfg_filtered()
    if (!has_rows(d)) return(data.frame(message = "No config health data available"))
    keep <- intersect(
      c("item_type", "name", "staleness_status", "inv_last_30d", "inv_last_90d",
        "session_count", "days_since_last_use", "has_paths_scope", "is_mandatory"),
      names(d)
    )
    DT::datatable(
      d[order(match(d$staleness_status,
                    c("never_used", "stale_90d", "stale_30d", "stale_7d", "mandatory", "active")),
              d$item_type, d$name), keep, drop = FALSE],
      caption = paste0("Config items (", nrow(d), " shown) — sorted by staleness"),
      options = list(pageLength = 25, dom = "tip"),
      rownames = FALSE
    )
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
